Friend,

**Mainstream Media has shown how unreliable it is when it comes to reporting the truth.**

After months of attacking conservatives who called for an investigation into the origin of COVID-19, the Liberal media is quietly taking back everything they said after realizing they were completely wrong.

I will not stand by and let them get away with a free pass. For too long they have continued to spread misinformation and dishonest reporting, only sowing more confusion and chaos within America.

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Never Again Protest on Monday
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_protest_monday&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Governor Walz will be extending his "Emergency" Powers for another 30 days and will be calling back the legislature on June 14th. The Governor and Senate Majority Leader Paul Gazelka are meeting behind closed doors right now, cutting deals to avoid a partial government shutdown on July 1st. All of this is happening while Walz remains in control of Unilateral Emergency Powers. **So why is Weakling Paul Gazelka standing in the way of passing the most important legislation of our time: the[Never Again Bill](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_bill_the_only_legislation_that_ends_governor_s_unilateral_emergency_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_protest_monday&n=2)?! We just went through 452 days of Unilateral Emergency Powers by Governor Walz. What could be more important?** Gazelka must think its okay that Tim Walz decided to shutdown our small businesses while allowing big box stores to be fully open. He must not care that the religious rights of Minnesotans were trampled on by Walz' decree to close our churches. Perhaps Gazelka doesn't actually care that Walz shoved COVID positive patients in nursing homes, leading many to their deaths. Or that Walz forced youth athletes to wear masks while playing sports. All of this was done unilaterally and against the Constitution...and in many cases, against science! **Gazelka recently[changed his tune](https://www.action4liberty.com/house_senate_republicans_change_tone_on_emergency_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_protest_monday&n=3) about Emergency Powers, acting like he's a tough guy in his backroom negotiations with Walz. But the Half-cocked End Emergency Powers bill that he's promoting doesn't solve the problem of the Governor being able to unilaterally declare Emergency Powers!** In fact, the bill's author, Senator Jeff Howe, stated that the bill "does not do anything to Chapter 12...if another event happens, another pandemic, tornado or flood, [the Governor] could declare another emergency". The House author, Rep Barb Haley, told the press that rewriting Emergency Powers will come at some other time in the future. What are these guys smoking?! There is a great bill already introduced by Rep Erik Mortensen that solves all these problems. The **Never Again Bill** eliminates the Governor's ability to unilaterally declare an emergency, eliminates his anti-liberty powers, and further protects Minnesotans with a Bill of Rights during Emergency. Why is Gazelka getting in the way of passing the most important piece of legislation? He hasn't even given it a vote in the Republican controlled Senate. This guy is **just a faker** when it comes to Ending Walz' Unilateral Emergency Powers. It's time we showed Gazelka that we mean business. Michele Even, a true patriotic activist, has put together an excellent Never Again Protest on Monday, June 14th in front of the Senate Office Building. **Michele wants our voice to be heard by every Senator, especially Weakling Gazelka, so they know there's a price to pay for selling out on Minnesota. For the first time in 15 months, the Senate Office building will be open to the public.** Join Michele, myself and Rep Erik Mortensen as the fence around the Capitol is torn down and the public is allowed back in. Make YOUR voice heard about how the Never Again Bill needs to pass before Gazelka agrees to a budget deal with Democrats.
## Where: [Senate Office Building](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=YDzITEgJp2pH9y7Nkh1bRC9z6FacUWfYroTV2oAsDbsPUHcnjrK8CXyqTzPsPK00jle28puzhauWTxnUwqEfGDofCDF80j0DZvK8yPVoRivy9l5yx6eVdwQ9GZM_n5JV&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_protest_monday&n=4)
## When: Monday, June 14th at 10:30 am
More information [here](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nmUUukZrx1xgsPFq6NPPOWE88O_KNkEW0Dhjnqt7jwa&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_protest_monday&n=5). Listen Peter, politics is won by those who show up. Radical leftists protest at the Capitol and often control the political landscape. We need every politician up there to see the power of our movement. And you can help. Please come join us on June 14th at 10:30 am at the Senate Office Building. Look for the crowd waving "Never Again" signs around. You'll know you're in the company of fellow patriots! **Can't make it? Action 4 Liberty is financially backing this protest. You can help us pay for the signs, cowbells and horns by donating today.[Donate $25, $50 or $100 immediately to help us make a loud voice on Monday!](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_protest_monday&n=6)** There's not a lot of time left. Let's end these Emergency Powers once and for all! **In Liberty,** **** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_protest_monday&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_protest_monday&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_protest_monday&n=9), software for leaders.

First, life is getting back to normal in Wisconsin. As your Congressman, I can't wait to see you and your family at our community festivals, parades, brat frys, picnics, and small businesses throughout our district! And second, I'm going to continue fighting for you against the radical socialists in Congress! We can't let up this fight for a minute! [[JOIN GLENN] - Support Him This Summer!](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mulukjd-yddjllujiu-y/) I want to say a heartfelt **THANK YOU** for your support this year. You've kept us on track with your loyal support and by being a part of this great team. For the second month in a row, we surpassed our fundraising goal in May - and we're going to keep up the work throughout the year!**_Because we're going to have to do even better to take back the majority in 2022! _**[Will you join, at any amount, to help keep us on track?](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mulukjd-yddjllujiu-t/) [$25 - Buy Candy for a Parade](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mulukjd-yddjllujiu-i/) [$75 - Gas Up The Campaign Car](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mulukjd-yddjllujiu-d/) [$750 - Donate 1/4 of the goal](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mulukjd-yddjllujiu-h/) [$1,500 - Donate 1/2 of the goal!!](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mulukjd-yddjllujiu-k/) Thank you again,Glenn | Glenn Grothman for Congress

name: Jennifer Carroll Foy
subject: thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
body:
| | |
Unfortunately, the result wasn’t what we were hoping for. However, I’m so proud of all we accomplished together.

For the last year and a half, working families from all backgrounds have come together to fight for the change we want to see. We have come together to lift up workers, women, and wages. To make sure that we've got shots in arms and people in jobs, and to ensure that Virginia is both the best place to work and raise a family. We have centered the voices of those who have been left out and left behind.

**Never did I imagine that in the former capital of the Confederacy, a girl from Petersburg could come this far.**

We came far and defied many odds because of YOU -- grassroots organizers, volunteers, and working families who believe we need something different than the status quo. Every minute, hour, and day that you put into this campaign and our movement made a difference for Virginia.

I have faith in each and every one of you to continue doing the important work to move Virginia forward – it’s worth it. And I’m so grateful to you. You jumped in and took a chance on this campaign. Thank you for believing in me -- I will never stop fighting for our shared vision for the future.

Lastly, we’re going to keep fighting for what's right. We're going to keep fighting to change the status quo that’s left too many people behind. We are going to fight to make sure that politicians aren't applying band aids from one crisis to the next and are tackling the challenges that we face in a way that will actually solve them. I will keep pushing for workers’ rights, healthcare access, criminal justice reform, gender equality, and a forward looking agenda that will lift up all Virginians.

**I will never stop fighting to build a Commonwealth where everyone has an opportunity to thrive. I will never stop working hard to make sure that a brighter future is on the horizon.**

Thank you and the work continues,

Jennifer

* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. | Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
---
Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
PO Box 2306
Arlington, VA 22202
United States

**Did you miss what was said this week? Here 's the latest:** AOC tweeted about the **squalid conditions** in which her "Abuela" resides on the island of Puerto Rico. Looking for sympathy and backlash against Trump, **the tweet backfired** and resulted in many criticizing AOC (who earns **$174,000 a year**) for letting her grandmother live in such an environment. Gavin Newsom announced Friday that he is **extending** the state of emergency order in California beyond the June 15th date that **he previously set himself**. This means Newsom gets to hold onto his emergency powers **even longer**.

subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Jay Jones for Attorney General
body:
|

| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/DtRdXI8AUsMlJjU4ExSwIPRO4CxFkYczp3Xc3Dd4PSo=/CO8klehHe0OSQ2ZrHQskdcHrWK3T_4ocQ8lQgnz_AA8=)
---
Friend -- I want to congratulate Attorney General Herring, Terry McAuliffe, and Delegate Hala Ayala on their victories last night. I look forward to working relentlessly with Democrats throughout the Commonwealth to beat Republicans up and down the ballot this November. Last night's result was disappointing, but we will not let it deter us from continuing to fight to bring true reform to Virginia. We must elect leaders who will be proactive, not reactive, and rise to meet this moment in our history. As we enter the new Virginia decade, we cannot afford to rest on our laurels. I look forward to continuing to work in the House of Delegates to build on the progress we have made towards a Virginia that guarantees justice for every community. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for your support in this endeavor. I will never stop fighting for you. \- Jay Jones

name: Rob Ortt
subject: My op-ed in today's New York Post
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ORTT FOR STATE SENATE
body:
NY Dems are proposing even more pro-criminal ‘reforms’
---
| | | | | | |
---
---
| |
---
| Friend - Today, the [New York Post](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tLDzXResw3EzlBxySZ32kMnBS0IBYe2dMUarOoXBwBS7RFbZ6A_uu5TT4l7EWamDcBST1-uxmbhqt-kbWgcKS7eJmhHI9ewbs6BfpyMQkESCAME-Kg2NMilpF-2EJrlBWLaaD3wRBU4pfrRXO_oXhNyr1ZY-sjj2JJAR_MuLA3VwmYwraExWIlH-ph8mTgNHig853-7JFf-OtqYeqsh0bpvKM37btFlx293YgwppIqI=&c=nm2ChzEXPlx_e1XEyVdimaUHOg99XiIu5qgo2xvLoEu8ZRjiTDv56g==&ch=XskHoWTQxiq9FO0uEvAdQ9maR9XRfk56TSmS4vwUZ7fyCluRmNUJUQ==) published my op-ed highlighting how the anti-police rhetoric and pro-criminal policies from Albany Democrats have led to a rise in crime across New York.
New York needs leaders who promote safe communities and support the men and women in law enforcement. That starts with ending one-party rule in Albany.
Please take a moment to read my op-ed below. God bless,
Rob Ortt Senate Republican Leader
---
| | |
---
|
---
| A huge spike in violent crime has left our city streets covered with bullet casings and awash with the blood of innocent bystanders -- including children caught in the crossfire of gangbangers. As if the state of public safety in Gotham and New York state weren't bad enough, Albany leftists are pushing to tip the balance even further in favor of criminals and against law enforcers, victims, taxpayers and law-abiding residents.
To understand this troubling turn of events, we have to return to the pre-COVID era. In 2019, one party came into control of all levers of state government, with Democrats taking charge of the state Senate, the Assembly and the governor's office. That dramatic shift in the balance of power was quickly followed by a dramatic leftward shift in policy coming out of the capital.
The state Legislature set out to enact the agenda of a small group of ultra-progressive New Yorkers, and rather than restrain lawmakers' radical impulses, Gov. Andrew Cuomo went along at most every turn, more concerned with his own grip on power than the safety of New Yorkers.
The results weren't surprising: Inflammatory anti-police rhetoric, combined with policies that prioritize criminals over victims and hardworking New Yorkers, have emboldened evildoers and put public safety in communities throughout the state in jeopardy -- and not just in the Big Apple.
The disturbing trend started with Democrats' misguided bail and discovery transformation. Progressives in Albany ushered in these so-called criminal-justice reforms while ignoring the warning cries of not just their Republican colleagues, but also law-enforcement officials, judges and district attorneys. Nearly everyone involved in the system -- except, that is, hard-left activists -- warned that removing judges' discretion in determining pretrial detention would yield catastrophe on the streets.
The soft-on-crime approach has resulted in a revolving door in the criminal-justice system. Every day, we see reports of brazen attacks in broad daylight, committed by perpetrators with multiple previous arrests for similar offenses who were nevertheless free to victimize more innocents.
But there's worse to come: In spite of the increase in violent crimes in every part of the state, Democrats have resolved to enact even more laws that prioritize criminals and further endanger public safety.
The proposed measures include a misguided "clean-slate" bill that would automatically wipe away criminal records for a vast range of serious crimes, including violent offenses. If enacted, a bank owner wouldn't know if he is hiring a convicted embezzler, and a single mother wouldn't know if she is moving across the hall from a convicted killer.
Democrats also wish to massively expand parole eligibility, ignoring the voices of victims and making it still-easier for the state's most dangerous criminals to get back on the streets, even as we see multiple violent crimes committed by those currently on parole.
Then there is the so-called Police Accountability Act (note the benevolent names attached to all of these radical measures). The APA attacks those who have taken an oath to protect and serve our communities and are trying to keep skyrocketing crime under control. It would set an absurdly high standard for justified uses of force, which seems designed to discourage cops from intervening when lives are in imminent danger.
There is a better way. My colleagues in the Senate Republican conference have put forward proposals to support our law-enforcement officials, protect victims' rights and restore justice and accountability to the out-of-control parole board.
The rise in crime isn't a partisan issue, nor should it be. Even the front-runners in the New York City mayoral race have recognized that they are facing a major crime problem. The same is true in communities throughout the Empire State. From large cities to small towns, they have all become less safe. It defies logic to ignore the link between the rise in crime and the drastic shift in policies and rhetoric coming out of Albany.
I urge all of my Democratic colleagues to join us in our efforts to restore common sense and public safety in the state -- for the good of all New Yorkers.
Robert Ortt (R) is the minority leader in the New York state Senate.
---

clean_body: NY Dems are proposing even more pro-criminal ‘reforms’ | | | | | | | | | | Friend - Today, the == published my op-ed highlighting how the anti-police rhetoric and pro-criminal policies from Albany Democrats have led to a rise in crime across New York. New York needs leaders who promote safe communities and support the men and women in law enforcement. That starts with ending one-party rule in Albany. Please take a moment to read my op-ed below. God bless, Rob Ortt Senate Republican Leader | | | | | A huge spike in violent crime has left our city streets covered with bullet casings and awash with the blood of innocent bystanders -- including children caught in the crossfire of gangbangers. As if the state of public safety in Gotham and New York state weren't bad enough, Albany leftists are pushing to tip the balance even further in favor of criminals and against law enforcers, victims, taxpayers and law-abiding residents. To understand this troubling turn of events, we have to return to the pre-COVID era. In 2019, one party came into control of all levers of state government, with Democrats taking charge of the state Senate, the Assembly and the governor's office. That dramatic shift in the balance of power was quickly followed by a dramatic leftward shift in policy coming out of the capital. The state Legislature set out to enact the agenda of a small group of ultra-progressive New Yorkers, and rather than restrain lawmakers' radical impulses, Gov. Andrew Cuomo went along at most every turn, more concerned with his own grip on power than the safety of New Yorkers. The results weren't surprising: Inflammatory anti-police rhetoric, combined with policies that prioritize criminals over victims and hardworking New Yorkers, have emboldened evildoers and put public safety in communities throughout the state in jeopardy -- and not just in the Big Apple. The disturbing trend started with Democrats' misguided bail and discovery transformation. Progressives in Albany ushered in these so-called criminal-justice reforms while ignoring the warning cries of not just their Republican colleagues, but also law-enforcement officials, judges and district attorneys. Nearly everyone involved in the system -- except, that is, hard-left activists -- warned that removing judges' discretion in determining pretrial detention would yield catastrophe on the streets. The soft-on-crime approach has resulted in a revolving door in the criminal-justice system. Every day, we see reports of brazen attacks in broad daylight, committed by perpetrators with multiple previous arrests for similar offenses who were nevertheless free to victimize more innocents. But there's worse to come: In spite of the increase in violent crimes in every part of the state, Democrats have resolved to enact even more laws that prioritize criminals and further endanger public safety. The proposed measures include a misguided "clean-slate" bill that would automatically wipe away criminal records for a vast range of serious crimes, including violent offenses. If enacted, a bank owner wouldn't know if he is hiring a convicted embezzler, and a single mother wouldn't know if she is moving across the hall from a convicted killer. Democrats also wish to massively expand parole eligibility, ignoring the voices of victims and making it still-easier for the state's most dangerous criminals to get back on the streets, even as we see multiple violent crimes committed by those currently on parole. Then there is the so-called Police Accountability Act (note the benevolent names attached to all of these radical measures). The APA attacks those who have taken an oath to protect and serve our communities and are trying to keep skyrocketing crime under control. It would set an absurdly high standard for justified uses of force, which seems designed to discourage cops from intervening when lives are in imminent danger. There is a better way. My colleagues in the Senate Republican conference have put forward proposals to support our law-enforcement officials, protect victims' rights and restore justice and accountability to the out-of-control parole board. The rise in crime isn't a partisan issue, nor should it be. Even the front-runners in the New York City mayoral race have recognized that they are facing a major crime problem. The same is true in communities throughout the Empire State. From large cities to small towns, they have all become less safe. It defies logic to ignore the link between the rise in crime and the drastic shift in policies and rhetoric coming out of Albany. I urge all of my Democratic colleagues to join us in our efforts to restore common sense and public safety in the state -- for the good of all New Yorkers. Robert Ortt (R) is the minority leader in the New York state Senate. | | | | SENATE REPUBLICAN LEADER ROB ORTT == | == == | | | == | PAID FOR BY ORTT FOR STATE SENATE | | Ortt for State Senate | PO Box 1279, North Tonawanda, NY 14120 | | Sent by mailto:rob@robortt.com powered by

name: Josh Hawley
subject: [EXPOSED] Schumer’s lies
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR
body:
Peter,
In 2018, during my campaign for U.S. Senate
in Missouri, Republican voters were flooded with mailers claiming
that I wasn't conservative enough for them. This wasn't during a
primary - this was during the general election.
The mail didn't have the required disclaimer
showing who funded it, and we always wondered who would send mail
like this during a general election and what they hoped to
accomplish.
Now we know, and I need to see if you can
help me make sure it doesn't happen again.
Chuck Schumer ran dark money through a
little-known non-profit called the "Coalition for a Safe and
Secure America" and his massive Senate Majority PAC. They did it
in hopes that Republicans would stay home and not vote for me.
It wasn't only me - the same scheme hurt at
least four other conservative candidates, and 2 of those patriots
lost their races. I am worried it is only a warm-up for what they
will throw at conservatives like me in 2022 and 2024 to prevent
us from winning and removing them from power.
Dirty tricks are their only hope of winning -
not engaging in a debate about ideas. It is what Democrats do -
they lie.

They are lying about HR1
They are lying about confiscating your
guns.
They are lying about the border crisis.
They are lying about defunding the
police.
They are lying about support for Israel.
They are lying about the January 6th
Commission.

This was all planned by Schumer, and he knew
I would get in the way of his radical, progressive agenda - so he
used every dirty trick he knew to stop me from getting in his
way.
We can't wait to find out what underhanded
and illegal tactic they use to pass their agenda now or tip the
scales of elections in 2022 and beyond - I need to be ready for
anything, and I won't be if you don't support me TODAY.

STAND WITH JOSH

Even in 2018, they knew I was a fighter, they
knew that I would work with President Trump to drain the swamp,
and they knew I wouldn't allow them to force him out of office
without standing up to them.
They were willing to do ANYTHING to stop me,
and I have only made them angrier. They tried to cancel me, and
it didn't work - what do you think they will do next?
I'll make no apologies for standing up for
President Trump or any other private citizen who cancel culture
tyrants target. I will never let them trample on our
Constitutional Rights-I owe that much to God, my family, and you.
I would also tell Chuck Schumer that if he
has to fool people into voting against me as the only way he can
hope to win, maybe he should look at his policies.
If you have had enough liberals using their
book of tricks to fool voters into voting against their values,
then I need you to show your anger with a donation of $1,000,
$500, $250, $100, or just $45 - every bit helps.
The fight for maintaining our freedom may be
long, but our nation is worth fighting for, and I refuse to give
up - no matter what they throw at me.
Will you help me?
For our Future,

Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri

STAND WITH JOSH

PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR
SENATE

Friend,

We’re planning a big surprise, and we want you to be part of it.

subject: Our ticket is set
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/q4pijQcoruDJAyWF0lhFo37bvhSZ5D-g36qf8VpcsmI=/svuhr9a6sAb9BKU4_ybg8gCtWzHjdkknlxjU9Lpp7Ws=)
---
Friend, Our Democratic ticket is set, and now the fight is on to protect our slim Democratic majority in the House of Delegates and secure another statewide sweep. **[Join us in supporting our Democratic nominees by making a contribution to our efforts today!](https://act.myngp.com/el/q4pijQcoruDJAyWF0lhFo37bvhSZ5D-g36qf8VpcsmI=/v0bKNNgJCH_do23JYFeviSKlyaj9iYmJn7DzXxuLWCk=)** Trump-backed Glenn Youngkin and the extreme Republican statewide ticket are out of touch with our mainstream Virginia values and will do everything in their power to turn back the clocks on our progress. We have passed historic gun safety legislation, repealed medically-unnecessary restrictions on women's healthcare, repealed racially discriminatory language in the Virginia Code, made Election Day a state holiday, and made Virginia the first Southern state to provide sweeping anti-discrimination protections for LGBTQ people. We are proud to be the third state in the nation to pass a ban on "no knock" warrants, and we have made monumental progress on criminal justice reform by becoming the first state in the South to abolish the death penalty. The list goes on and on. **[Let 's join together to support our Democratic nominees us and down the ticket today and get out the vote this November!](https://act.myngp.com/el/q4pijQcoruDJAyWF0lhFo37bvhSZ5D-g36qf8VpcsmI=/v0bKNNgJCH_do23JYFeviSKlyaj9iYmJn7DzXxuLWCk=)** \- Team Northam

| Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597

body:
We need a historic response.
| | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30515921/289772840/-2023814932?refcode=20210609_JC_6AQ_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGI4MmMwYi0zMWM5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4EwhksLEpJ-GJ1Y9GeF6xOTcJsVIf5Icvw8KSjoncb0=)

| | Derek,

Last night, Terry McAuliffe officially became the Democratic nominee for Virginia Governor.

I’m writing to say thank you to the more than 22,000 folks who chipped in to help Terry win. Terry couldn’t have done it without you, Derek.

So here’s my message on day one of what will be 2021’s most important race: don’t let up. Not even for a second. There’s too much on the line for Virginia and our country.

[**Can you chip in and make sure Terry has what he needs to take on Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30515922/289772863/-2023814932?refcode=20210609_JC_6AQ_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGI4MmMwYi0zMWM5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4EwhksLEpJ-GJ1Y9GeF6xOTcJsVIf5Icvw8KSjoncb0=)

Terry’s extreme, right-wing opponent Glenn Youngkin has outraised Terry for two straight fundraising quarters.

The worst part is how he did it. Glenn doesn’t have a movement behind him, he has Donald Trump, Ted Cruz, and hundreds of millions of dollars from his bank account.

But Terry has something better: you, me, and a historic grassroots fundraising effort unlike anything Virginia has ever seen.

[**Donate today and help make sure a proud Democrat and a damn good leader like Terry McAuliffe wins in Virginia.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30515923/289772864/-2023814932?refcode=20210609_JC_6AQ_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGI4MmMwYi0zMWM5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4EwhksLEpJ-GJ1Y9GeF6xOTcJsVIf5Icvw8KSjoncb0=)

Thank you so much,

James Carville | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30515924/289772865/-2023814932?refcode=20210609_JC_6AQ_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGI4MmMwYi0zMWM5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4EwhksLEpJ-GJ1Y9GeF6xOTcJsVIf5Icvw8KSjoncb0=)

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: IMPORTANT CALL TO ACTION UPDATE for week of June 7th!
body:
| |
---
After speaking with some allies yesterday, **we have an important update** to our call to action regarding the Democrats’ election bills. Please see below!

We had asked everyone to call Sen. Joe Manchin, but from what we are hearing, we are making the following changes.

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
**If you live in West Virginia**
It is crucial that you keep calling Sen. Manchin. When you call, tell him the following.

**Thank you for Sen. Manchin’s courageous stance** against S.1, ‘The Corrupt Politicians Act,’ (the Democrats call it the ‘For the People Act’), and his courage to stand against Democrat efforts to weaken or get rid of the filibuster. We want to thank him for both of these!

**Next, please oppose the ‘Pelosi Power Grab’ bill, known as the John Lewis Act.** In fact, Sen. Manchin has promised to not give control of WV elections to federal bureaucrats, and he must keep this promise!**** The ‘Pelosi Power Grab’ bill, which right now Sen. Manchin wants to expand to apply all 50 states, would require every state and city to get permission from the radically left-wing Department of Justice Civil Rights Division before changing ANY voting/election laws. This undoubtedly gives control of ALL election laws to the unaccountable, unelected bureaucracy!

If you can, please call all of his offices, not just his D.C. office. However, if you do not have the time, just call his D.C. office.

D.C.: (202) 224-3954
Charleston: 304-342-5855
Martinsburg: 304-264-4626
Fairmont: 304-368-0567
**If you don’t live in West Virginia**
If you know people in West Virginia, please ask them to call Sen. Manchin with those two messages. We need as many people calling as possible.
**If you a have Republican Senator (or two)**
Call their DC offices and buck them up! Tell them thank you for opposing the Democrats’ efforts to takeover elections through S.1 (‘The Corrupt Politicians Act’) and H.R. 4 (‘The Pelosi Power Grab’ bill). As of right now, there are zero Republicans supporting either of these bills, but if they can pull one or two of the liberal Republicans over to vote for these bills, then they will pass. So, call them and tell them thank you and to keep up their opposition!
**Resources to read before calling**

[Returning the ghost of Eric Holder to the Justice Department](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTYwLTc2NWEzNTZlM2IyOTRlYTZhNjUwM2I0YWQwYjk3YWEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVoaWxsLmNvbS9vcGluaW9uL2NhbXBhaWduLzU1NDc5OS1yZXR1cm5pbmctdGhlLWdob3N0LW9mLWVyaWMtaG9sZGVyLXRvLXRoZS1qdXN0aWNlLWRlcGFydG1lbnQ_bWlkPTQzODkyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=HjLqht_bBR76dKMUi9jhHA)
[Election Transparency Initiative tweet](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTYwLTc2NWEzNTZlM2IyOTRlYTZhNjUwM2I0YWQwYjk3YWEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9FVElfbm93L3N0YXR1cy8xNDAwNTE4NzY5NTA0NTU1MDA5P21pZD00Mzg5MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=l8MQ_ASiXEIIsLmryz2aCg) about the [2017 letter](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTYwLTc2NWEzNTZlM2IyOTRlYTZhNjUwM2I0YWQwYjk3YWEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29sbGlucy5zZW5hdGUuZ292L3NpdGVzL2RlZmF1bHQvZmlsZXMvQmlwYXJ0aXNhbiUyMFByZXNlcnZlJTIwRmlsaWJ1c3RlciUyMExldHRlci5wZGY_bWlkPTQzODkyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=yhWJmzJxUGg-opkAeg598A) defending the filibuster
[Democrats’ Partisan Power Grab: Vetoing State Voter Laws](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTYwLTc2NWEzNTZlM2IyOTRlYTZhNjUwM2I0YWQwYjk3YWEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9oZXJpdGFnZWFjdGlvbi5jb20vYmxvZy9kZW1vY3JhdHMtcGFydGlzYW4tcG93ZXItZ3JhYi12ZXRvaW5nLXN0YXRlLXZvdGVyLWxhd3M_bWlkPTQzODkyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=uW5pZQkUG_N_S5NlrVc1GQ)

Thousands of Anthony Fauci's emails were released to the public last week, following a FOIA request from BuzzFeed News. And, while to some the emails were shocking, to us and many others, they just confirmed what we had been saying for a long-time: Anthony Fauci is a typical, power-hungry bureaucrat that cannot be trusted.

[Read more about the emails here.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTYwLTc2NWEzNTZlM2IyOTRlYTZhNjUwM2I0YWQwYjk3YWEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGFpbHl3aXJlLmNvbS9uZXdzL2ZhdWNpZW1haWxzLXVuY292ZXJlZC1lbWFpbHMtYWJvdXQtbWFza3Mtc3Bhcmstb3V0cmFnZS1zcGVjdWxhdGlvbj9taWQ9NDM4OTImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=FF5h0JXPgFyE5ej9UXOu5w)
|
---
**Commit to Sign Waving on June 29th & Attending Your Local School Board Meeting in July**
We are all much more likely to do something if we make an official commitment to do it – that’s why during election time, campaigns get people to sign up and commit to actually go vote.

**Therefore, we are asking you to sign up and commit to sign wave on June 29th and attend your local school board meeting in July. Click through the links below to make your commitments.**

**Sign Waving on June 29th**
In honor of Independence Day, and in order to stand against the divisiveness of the left and ideologies like Critical Race Theory, the sign waving theme is **‘United We Stand.’** The grassroots approved holding the sign waving event before July 4th, so that more people would be able to participate.

**[I will organize or attend a ‘United We Stand’ sign waving on June 29th](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTYwLTc2NWEzNTZlM2IyOTRlYTZhNjUwM2I0YWQwYjk3YWEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZUozRktqaWdYVHAtMmU5bHJ5cnc3YUF3Z3NJRnB4OVkzX2pqeVdiVlkyWUdFS0VRL3ZpZXdmb3JtP3VzcD1zZl9saW5rJm1pZD00Mzg5MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=T1vmMLI-7cPLe_B5mhR9mw)**

**School Board Meeting in July**
Whether it’s virtual or in person, and whether or not you have kids who attend the local public schools, it’s crucial that you are involved in the local school board’s meetings. What the schools are teaching kids or making them do (like wear masks all day) affects all of us, even if we don’t have kids, or our kids are grown up, or our kids go to private schools.

We will have a toolkit ready for you before July, so that you have plenty of time to prepare for the meeting. Part of your preparation is doing the research listed in the next action item.

**[I will attend my local school board’s July meeting](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTYwLTc2NWEzNTZlM2IyOTRlYTZhNjUwM2I0YWQwYjk3YWEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZDhVUVNSemtvOWZ4bTlsY3p1WG9LQk1scGFuVWNtSWxXaVhDeXNSVWRBaE52Y2ZRL3ZpZXdmb3JtP3VzcD1zZl9saW5rJm1pZD00Mzg5MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=2YjQiH8Denx3fg7RQBOhbQ)**

Despite Democrat leaders and the Mainstream Media assuring us that it was not possible that the coronavirus originated in a Wuhan Lab, mounting evidence seems to point to just that...

For over a year, even asking the question of whether it was possible got you labeled a conspiracy theorist and shouted down by those with media megaphones. However, much to their chagrin, some individuals took the question seriously and decided to investigate the idea.

[Vanity Fair breaks down what they found.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTYwLTc2NWEzNTZlM2IyOTRlYTZhNjUwM2I0YWQwYjk3YWEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudmFuaXR5ZmFpci5jb20vbmV3cy8yMDIxLzA2L3RoZS1sYWItbGVhay10aGVvcnktaW5zaWRlLXRoZS1maWdodC10by11bmNvdmVyLWNvdmlkLTE5cy1vcmlnaW5zP21pZD00Mzg5MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=NSoAVE2Qclnfz0isNEKSOQ)
|
---
**Get Your Research on Local Government Done This Week**
July is National Attend a School Board Meeting Month. August is National Attend a City Government Meeting Month. This week is the time to get all your research done about your local government, so that in July and August (and any other time that arises), you are ready to act.

Please note that the exact names of the government entities will vary from place to place, i.e. it might be called “county council,” or “county commission,” etc. That’s part of your research – what are your local government entities even called? Compile your research in a spreadsheet or document on your computer, or on paper, whichever you prefer. Just make sure it’s easy to access when you need it.

**Basic List of Local Government Entities to Research**
* School Board (even if you don’t have kids in the local school district, you pay taxes to support it and have a say)
* City Council
* County Council
* Library Board
* Board of Elections

**Basic Questions to Research**
* How many members are there?
* Who are the members?
* What is their contact information?
* Are they appointed or elected? If appointed, who appoints them and when? If elected, when is their next election?
* Do they represent districts? If so, what are the districts and is there a map you can access?
* When do they meet?
* Can you attend a meeting in person or is it online?
* Where do they meet if it’s in person? If it’s online, how can you register for the online meeting? Do you need to RSVP ahead of time?
* Can you comment during a meeting? If so, what are the rules about commenting? How much time will you have? Do you have to sign up ahead of time?
* Right now, do they require masks to attend the meetings?
* What’s the process for submitting legislation/ordinances/rules to them?

_Anything else you find that you think would be important to know ahead of time!_

Finally, begin thinking about what the most concerning, pressing issue is in your local schools. Is it Critical Race Theory/Diversity, Equity, Inclusion programs? Is it mandatory masks? Is it getting kids back into the classroom in person? Is it crazy sex-ed curriculum? If you aren’t sure, ask other parents, or people who have kids in the school system, or look for news stories, or look on social media. If you don’t know, use this time to try and find out. If there isn’t a pressing issue, then you may want to work on getting them to proactively reject Critical Race Theory, etc. Look for more information in the toolkit once it is released.
|
---
**Important Sign-up Forms**
If you haven’t yet signed up for the Eternal Vigilance Project, please sign up this week! There are two levels available. Keeper of the Republic of has fewer commitments than Champion of the Republic, so pick the level that matches your availability, and while even Keeper might be a challenge, I encourage you to try to meet that challenge. Sign up at the links below.
[KEEPER OF THE REPUBLIC](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTYwLTc2NWEzNTZlM2IyOTRlYTZhNjUwM2I0YWQwYjk3YWEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMva2VlcGVyLW9mLXRoZS1yZXB1YmxpYy8_bWlkPTQzODkyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=Pxa9g8_66KjdABxMckZQYg)
[CHAMPION OF THE REPUBLIC](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTYwLTc2NWEzNTZlM2IyOTRlYTZhNjUwM2I0YWQwYjk3YWEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMvY2hhbXBpb24tb2YtdGhlLXJlcHVibGljLz9taWQ9NDM4OTImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=pimooqMBx5BUoZE0dht81w)
If you’re interested in running for local office, especially if you’d like to run in the 2022 election, now is the time to let us know because you must get trained in 2021!
[LOCAL OFFICE CANDIDATE SURVEY](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTYwLTc2NWEzNTZlM2IyOTRlYTZhNjUwM2I0YWQwYjk3YWEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMvbG9jYWwtb2ZmaWNlLWNhbmRpZGF0ZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP21pZD00Mzg5MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=DTun3Nhs9TxX43LsOtmFAw)

clean_body: | | After speaking with some allies yesterday, we have an important update to our call to action regarding the Democrats’ election bills. Please see below! We had asked everyone to call Sen. Joe Manchin, but from what we are hearing, we are making the following changes. Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it. | If you live in West Virginia It is crucial that you keep calling Sen. Manchin. When you call, tell him the following. Thank you for Sen. Manchin’s courageous stance against S.1, ‘The Corrupt Politicians Act,’ (the Democrats call it the ‘For the People Act’), and his courage to stand against Democrat efforts to weaken or get rid of the filibuster. We want to thank him for both of these! Next, please oppose the ‘Pelosi Power Grab’ bill, known as the John Lewis Act. In fact, Sen. Manchin has promised to not give control of WV elections to federal bureaucrats, and he must keep this promise!** The ‘Pelosi Power Grab’ bill, which right now Sen. Manchin wants to expand to apply all 50 states, would require every state and city to get permission from the radically left-wing Department of Justice Civil Rights Division before changing ANY voting/election laws. This undoubtedly gives control of ALL election laws to the unaccountable, unelected bureaucracy! If you can, please call all of his offices, not just his D.C. office. However, if you do not have the time, just call his D.C. office. D.C.: (202) 224-3954 Charleston: 304-342-5855 Martinsburg: 304-264-4626 Fairmont: 304-368-0567 If you don’t live in West Virginia If you know people in West Virginia, please ask them to call Sen. Manchin with those two messages. We need as many people calling as possible. If you a have Republican Senator (or two) Call their DC offices and buck them up! Tell them thank you for opposing the Democrats’ efforts to takeover elections through S.1 (‘The Corrupt Politicians Act’) and H.R. 4 (‘The Pelosi Power Grab’ bill). As of right now, there are zero Republicans supporting either of these bills, but if they can pull one or two of the liberal Republicans over to vote for these bills, then they will pass. So, call them and tell them thank you and to keep up their opposition! Resources to read before calling about the defending the filibuster | Thousands of Anthony Fauci's emails were released to the public last week, following a FOIA request from BuzzFeed News. And, while to some the emails were shocking, to us and many others, they just confirmed what we had been saying for a long-time: Anthony Fauci is a typical, power-hungry bureaucrat that cannot be trusted. | Commit to Sign Waving on June 29th & Attending Your Local School Board Meeting in July We are all much more likely to do something if we make an official commitment to do it – that’s why during election time, campaigns get people to sign up and commit to actually go vote. Therefore, we are asking you to sign up and commit to sign wave on June 29th and attend your local school board meeting in July. Click through the links below to make your commitments. Sign Waving on June 29th In honor of Independence Day, and in order to stand against the divisiveness of the left and ideologies like Critical Race Theory, the sign waving theme is ‘United We Stand.’ The grassroots approved holding the sign waving event before July 4th, so that more people would be able to participate. School Board Meeting in July Whether it’s virtual or in person, and whether or not you have kids who attend the local public schools, it’s crucial that you are involved in the local school board’s meetings. What the schools are teaching kids or making them do (like wear masks all day) affects all of us, even if we don’t have kids, or our kids are grown up, or our kids go to private schools. We will have a toolkit ready for you before July, so that you have plenty of time to prepare for the meeting. Part of your preparation is doing the research listed in the next action item. | Despite Democrat leaders and the Mainstream Media assuring us that it was not possible that the coronavirus originated in a Wuhan Lab, mounting evidence seems to point to just that... For over a year, even asking the question of whether it was possible got you labeled a conspiracy theorist and shouted down by those with media megaphones. However, much to their chagrin, some individuals took the question seriously and decided to investigate the idea. | Get Your Research on Local Government Done This Week July is National Attend a School Board Meeting Month. August is National Attend a City Government Meeting Month. This week is the time to get all your research done about your local government, so that in July and August (and any other time that arises), you are ready to act. Please note that the exact names of the government entities will vary from place to place, i.e. it might be called “county council,” or “county commission,” etc. That’s part of your research – what are your local government entities even called? Compile your research in a spreadsheet or document on your computer, or on paper, whichever you prefer. Just make sure it’s easy to access when you need it. Basic List of Local Government Entities to Research School Board (even if you don’t have kids in the local school district, you pay taxes to support it and have a say) City Council County Council Library Board Board of Elections Basic Questions to Research How many members are there? Who are the members? What is their contact information? Are they appointed or elected? If appointed, who appoints them and when? If elected, when is their next election? Do they represent districts? If so, what are the districts and is there a map you can access? When do they meet? Can you attend a meeting in person or is it online? Where do they meet if it’s in person? If it’s online, how can you register for the online meeting? Do you need to RSVP ahead of time? Can you comment during a meeting? If so, what are the rules about commenting? How much time will you have? Do you have to sign up ahead of time? Right now, do they require masks to attend the meetings? What’s the process for submitting legislation/ordinances/rules to them? Anything else you find that you think would be important to know ahead of time! Finally, begin thinking about what the most concerning, pressing issue is in your local schools. Is it Critical Race Theory/Diversity, Equity, Inclusion programs? Is it mandatory masks? Is it getting kids back into the classroom in person? Is it crazy sex-ed curriculum? If you aren’t sure, ask other parents, or people who have kids in the school system, or look for news stories, or look on social media. If you don’t know, use this time to try and find out. If there isn’t a pressing issue, then you may want to work on getting them to proactively reject Critical Race Theory, etc. Look for more information in the toolkit once it is released. | Important Sign-up Forms If you haven’t yet signed up for the Eternal Vigilance Project, please sign up this week! There are two levels available. Keeper of the Republic of has fewer commitments than Champion of the Republic, so pick the level that matches your availability, and while even Keeper might be a challenge, I encourage you to try to meet that challenge. Sign up at the links below. If you’re interested in running for local office, especially if you’d like to run in the 2022 election, now is the time to let us know because you must get trained in 2021! | "Move over, Woodrow Wilson. Take a seat, Barack Obama. Let him through, Franklin Roosevelt and Lyndon Johnson. Based on last week’s $6 trillion budget proposal, Joe Biden has surpassed all of those liberal icons to take a position at the head of the pack as the most extreme radical ever to inhabit the White House. Were Biden to succeed in turning his budget proposal into reality, he would more radically transform the nation than those previous presidents combined." Our own | Plan Your Summer Events Now The grassroots approved the upcoming events listed below, and the sooner you get yours planned, the better your events will be! letting us know whether you will organize or attend these summer events. | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. © 2021 80 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003 | **

Glenn’s money advantage has national election experts sounding the alarm. Analysts at Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ are even on the record saying Virginia is the GOP’s BEST shot at picking up a governorship in 2021.

Derek, the Virginia Governor’s race is the most important test for Democrats ahead of next year’s midterms. We have to win and send the message that Democrats are just as fired up to stop Trumpism as we were in 2020.

So I’ll be blunt, Derek. If you sit this one out, Youngkin and Trump _will_ win. Youngkin will ban abortion, put more guns on our streets, and rollback Virginia’s progress.

Worse, he’ll bring Donald Trump and Ted Cruz’s hateful politics to Virginia. He’ll embolden Donald Trump before the midterms where slim Democratic majorities are on the line.

**[Please, pitch in to help us take on Glenn Youngkin as he tries to bring Trumpism back to Virginia.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30524076/289801398/-2023814932?refcode=20210609_TM_6Y_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGYwYTVlYy00MWM5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J3XawknXxlj3BvKz49cMqqlUATJmhq5_iqIsvVRxZ6M=)**

I know we can get it done, but it won’t happen without you.

\-- Terry

name: Mark Levine
subject: I'm grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Levine for Virginia
body:
Team,

I want to thank the more than a hundred volunteers, more than a thousand donors, and more than fifty thousand Virginians who believed in my campaign to give Virginia a full-time year-round Lieutenant Governor, to give us someone who travels the Commonwealth speaking directly and honestly to our bosses—the people—to address their concerns. I still believe in that vision of transparent, accessible central government, even if it’s not up to me to carry it out.

Terry McAuliffe, Hala Ayala, and Mark Herring are good people. I’ve worked with each of them individually and personally. I know them well. I know their dedication to making Virginia a better place. I look forward to supporting them this fall.

There are far too many people for me to thank here. So many names flood my mind. You know who you are. I love you all. If you made calls on my behalf, gave a donation, sent texts, made a video, talked to your friends, or did any of the other time-consuming tasks a modern campaign entails, I appreciate it. Many of you spent countless hours, but I counted them. I know what you’ve done. Some of you spoke until you were hoarse, walked miles until you were faint, and suffered heatstroke as you put every part of yourselves you could in this campaign. Thank you for believing in me. I’m confident we could have done nothing more.

I particularly want to thank Andrew Parker, Andrew Goddard, my own parents and others who took their personal pain from acts of horrific violence and used that terrible power to try to make the world a better place.

I have spent a lifetime fighting injustice, long before I was in elective office. It’s never been a battle I’ve fought alone. There’s just too much injustice in the world for any of us to do that. I want to thank all of you for marching alongside me, whether in grassroots activism, in acts of kindness, in listening, or in proposing creative solutions to serious problems. Thank you for giving me the platform to speak truth to power and the privilege to say things in public that others only dare whisper in private. I know it’s always far easier to stay silent and to “go along to get along” than to speak out. I was honored to amplify your voice.

I also know you weren’t fighting for me. We were fighting together to represent those too often ignored by those in power: the little guy; the people who knock on doors and bang their heads against the wall but get no answers; the victims of gun violence who have none but us alive to remember them; working people; those suffering from racism, sexism, homophobia, antisemitism, and Islamophobia; immigrants; transgender people profiled by police; people with disabilities; those facing the impacts of climate change; those suffering from Alzheimer’s and their families; and those who don’t earn a decent wage or can’t afford adequate health care or housing. We heard you. We spoke out for you, even when you could not.

I’m proud of my six-year legacy: transparency, laws protecting children from domestic violence, comprehensive Rainbow rights, police body cameras, conflict de-escalation in schools, animal rights, paper ballots, election reform, removing racist statues and highways, 24/7 centers for abuse survivors, rape-kit preservation, lots of common-sense gun legislation, and so much more. I’m also proud I killed a slew of bad laws because I noticed details others missed.

I’ve had the honor of impacting positive change in the world in so many ways already through decades of activism, thousands of radio and tv shows, and dozens of laws. Whatever the future lies for me, I know I will never stop speaking out against injustice.

Please join me in doing so, wherever you see it and wherever you can. I still believe we don’t have to accept things because “that’s just the way they are”. I still believe if you’re persistent and creative, get the details right, and work with others of good will, even the toughest problems can be solved.

Let’s get to work.

-- Mark

Paid for by Levine for Virginia

Levine for VA
805 Rivergate Pl
Alexandria, VA 22314
United States

I have spent a lifetime fighting injustice, long before I was in elective office. It’s never been a battle I’ve fought alone. There’s just too much injustice in the world for any of us to do that. I want to thank all of you for marching alongside me, whether in grassroots activism, in acts of kindness, in listening, or in proposing creative solutions to serious problems. Thank you for giving me the platform to speak truth to power and the privilege to say things in public that others only dare whisper in private. I know it’s always far easier to stay silent and to “go along to get along” than to speak out. I was honored to amplify your voice. I also know you weren’t fighting for me. We were fighting together to represent those too often ignored by those in power: the little guy; the people who knock on doors and bang their heads against the wall but get no answers; the victims of gun violence who have none but us alive to remember them; working people; those suffering from racism, sexism, homophobia, antisemitism, and Islamophobia; immigrants; transgender people profiled by police; people with disabilities; those facing the impacts of climate change; those suffering from Alzheimer’s and their families; and those who don’t earn a decent wage or can’t afford adequate health care or housing. We heard you. We spoke out for you, even when you could not. I’m proud of my six-year legacy: transparency, laws protecting children from domestic violence, comprehensive Rainbow rights, police body cameras, conflict de-escalation in schools, animal rights, paper ballots, election reform, removing racist statues and highways, 24/7 centers for abuse survivors, rape-kit preservation, lots of common-sense gun legislation, and so much more. I’m also proud I killed a slew of bad laws because I noticed details others missed. I’ve had the honor of impacting positive change in the world in so many ways already through decades of activism, thousands of radio and tv shows, and dozens of laws. Whatever the future lies for me, I know I will never stop speaking out against injustice. Please join me in doing so, wherever you see it and wherever you can. I still believe we don’t have to accept things because “that’s just the way they are”. I still believe if you’re persistent and creative, get the details right, and work with others of good will, even the toughest problems can be solved. Let’s get to work. -- Mark Paid for by Levine for Virginia Levine for VA 805 Rivergate Pl Alexandria, VA 22314 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

clean_body: I’m all in — will you join me? | | | Derek, Virginia Democrats have officially selected Terry McAuliffe as our nominee for governor, and I’m all in to help him keep our Commonwealth blue. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Terry McAuliffe and Mark Warner: = = = = = = We’ve made incredible gains in the past few years, with Democrats holding full control in Richmond for the first time in a generation. Because of that, we’ve passed legislation to combat gun violence, lower health care costs, expand voting rights, and more. But all of our progress is on the line this November, Derek. That’s because nearly every time we’ve elected a new Democratic president in the last 50 years, Republicans have WON the Virginia governorship the following year! We need all hands on deck to change this trend.= It would be a disaster if Republican Glenn Youngkin became Virginia’s next governor. Not only is he endorsed by Donald Trump and Ted Cruz, but he won the nomination by focusing his campaign on the big lie that the 2020 election was stolen. Youngkin’s already poured $12 million of his own money into his campaign account, so Terry is going to have his hands full catching up.= Thank you! Together, we’ll keep Virginia blue. — Mark Warner = * | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

subject: Is this the REAL origin of COVID-19?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Earls for Georgia |
body:
We never believed a bat was actually to blame for killing millions of people across the globe. | |
---
[](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=b98e2cae96fa4adc9bcb5456aa349bcb&_e=GaEIeTw-V0YocmRDbLr72HpkIgRsx-7Wcgp195gdXFBI0LDsuqqHO0i5ijo44czO2zf2_TlPZPHJG4xYValy5oUdT_r3RLiT17TVK2a1vXWpOTonAiQy51z0tO8tZTKSo5hJMKfnGlqN7Umh5UyR7E1v246AGcic-g-I8-db29VF1flN26PYkqP5FCAPt5fBdXvXaACMtWuXlE5IVFcKL5i3Pi1lCufqgo3CDdx-nsLwSx4TgAuDn5edUQIekw0_iwE6-cReC6NVaPGlC_puSbeF_Zf8eWtEJLvygykf-Hx2ZEUXLdIjl8tZeluGp04gQRKF_UHjnwtvbgQcJEL1WQK5_X7EEPHt-yjGwb-LDaTTQB4DSgWpJYVQvX0tlWIYy2QM2QvRrw_ATbJPsbfqMyWSxCovTHRoJ0lsx8sCMiim_4ZMQr9MBUARH3oJFt0r0jT5vI5lIFWWXpwfhixYEJTDViLBjh8ySm_QKufF2H9LOU59_mDjr8HpjRz8v0fd)
|
---
Peter,

After a year of Democrats writing it off as a crazy conservative conspiracy theory, the truth is finally coming out about the _**real**_ origins of the coronavirus...

**It was engineered in a biolab in Wuhan.**

But even if the bogus “wet market” coverup story was true, the Chinese Communist Party would _**still**_ be responsible for killing millions of people.

Do you agree, Peter?

name: Peter Franchot
subject: My plan to lower health care costs
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
Despite our state being home to nation-leading health care providers, far too many Marylanders continue to live without health insurance, and many more are underinsured or are unable to afford the cost of services even with coverage. Marylanders deserve better, which is why I’m going to lower health care costs and expand affordable primary and preventive care as your next Governor.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/Qe-DGG7HaUWK1jRVPvyQDQ2?source=active [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Qe-DGG7HaUWK1jRVPvyQDQ2?source=active]Social determinants of health -- like poverty, access to transportation, good housing and healthy food -- all have major impacts on health outcomes for Marylanders. That’s why my health care policy will seek to fund primary and preventive care that proactively improves health outcomes before the need for hospitalization arises, saving money and improving our quality of life in the process.
If you want to help lower health care costs and expand affordable primary and preventive care, then I need your support today. Will you sign on to my health care plan as a Citizen Co-Sponsor? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Qe-DGG7HaUWK1jRVPvyQDQ2?source=active]
I also recognize that while preventing chronic health conditions is vital, we must also provide support for those who require more advanced care. Prescription drug prices have become too expensive for the average Marylander. That’s why I’m going to explore an expansion of the Prescription Drug Affordability Board to full coverage of the prescription market. Maryland’s working families shouldn’t have to choose between getting life-saving medication and putting food on the table.
In 2022, we have an opportunity to secure a better and brighter future for our state. Together, we’re going to lower health care costs, expand affordable primary and preventive care, and ultimately improve the quality of life for all of Maryland’s diverse communities.
Let me know that you’re with me in this fight. Add your name if you agree with my plan to lower health care costs for Marylanders, and expand affordable primary and preventive care. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Qe-DGG7HaUWK1jRVPvyQDQ2?source=active]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em060921]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/28595d0e-42c9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7/c6bd29a5-4cc9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmJkMjlhNS00Y2M5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5zy4pj5W0jTYnObVkPA5jaEa69HOIm0gNQRMnM9c-_g=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

---
| | Friend,

Hunter Biden’s business deals in Ukraine and China have been overshadowed the last few days by the discovery of a **cache of text messages uncovered in his laptop, which now show his frequent use of the N-word.**

This is disgusting and unacceptable behavior. Worst yet, I can’t help but notice the silence from CNN and countless ‘woke’ celebrities on this issue.
---
| [STOP THE HYPOCRISY](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3050%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1%2bPko2egPiS%2b5Sc2mwl6Bg&sysid=1 "STOP THE HYPOCRISY")

---
|

| The Democrats throw around racist accusations at anyone that stands up for conservative values, but when the President’s son uses repulsive racial slurs-- they’re silent? **Where is the outrage from the Democrats on these offensive and racist comments from the President’s son?**

Can you imagine if this was Donald Trump Jr.? There would be wall-to-wall coverage on every channel and BLM protests outside the White House. **What’s with the double standard?**

---
| [HOLD HUNTER BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3051%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a8wKTvh0M5NSpbjJSwzs5w&sysid=1 "HOLD HUNTER BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE")

The mainstream media is in Biden’s pocket, and they’re prepared to do whatever it takes to protect him. **Can I count on you to donate today to end the hypocrisy and hold the Biden’s accountable?**

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: pride month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qQnrYSbQodriA70yiUvkylE9sWWKBLC5HS0Op6MBFgE=/7PK8f69gEsivm_HR_FlmLFveQjiq0hB7zbf0tkka6Yk=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210609-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

Happy Pride month!

Among the proudest moments I've had in Congress has been voting to pass the Equality Act twice. If passed by the Senate and signed into law, the Equality Act would prohibit discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation, gender identity, or sex.

**As long as I serve in Congress, I will always champion LGBTQ+ rights.**

This Pride month, I hope you take the time to celebrate the joy and resilience of your friends, family, and heroes in the LGBTQ+ community.

Thank you for your time,

Abigail

Fellow American,

On June 28th and again on July 3rd, 2020 the Second Amendment to the United States Constitution saved the life of not only myself, but my wife’s life.

When the angry Fascist Black Lives Matter mob came marching toward our home, we did what many of you reading this email right now would do: w**e grabbed our guns to protect our home and our lives**.

**Turns out our Founding Fathers were onto something** when they decided to prominently place Americans’ rights to keep and bear arms into the Constitution.

**[My name is Mark McCloskey and I’m running for the United States Senate to protect our Second Amendment rights which are under attack from President Biden and Washington Democrats.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=49b922e297aa465a8877f535e7eee378&_e=i9XFGA3Y11PyanAnSNUevw9ReXxwfmYNSce-QhrhIHu-65UNd3xRa3a9IM2nsNTu-ZX1A-P5-kwRa1WC0FluVnKezB0_5xSMEEKptzOSqqzHs3NL5y_SFkfPQyxpvGXg2EgKP3gEYj3-EjPnyAf1nLKbtCV20O5OXlsk1Q0ZhWyrMc6aXlX4MPZG61QP1ooXf6H9P9TGIplqW_oPzXe7nif5uYUnlMFKe3fXaB7RQIZHxN4maXTKcJ_UYujXVpxyknbwW6K5LSGimUTcCBjE1uBaHaiH0L8o7YIQ5o-pokevL29CEDhbrXvQwqn9FET_HPNf93EEgPEJlrqlxFMxNwv2GLR9VhvCvCOFYAz-gSDfwFW9zSACSwHHZqXav9fQ-GwQmzg2bydNSk1Dmo5w7TTUW14w8DzZ_bCQs5rFRsx0CA7d2Pv4M_f1eSJ48acm1jlrq_YTdihxIEDALSzNGZNWvDCsX3SuTmRjvH90yVLYzbOwRiTT41FdeuJIuN4Id_a8BEz_iYc2e4oiuBSBkNPmC7wt6OBxb9pVJvLQZpazzqs59BBAITDYER3A7vIQ6ExMpI4JiH9NQy-79vF5BpbFuqh1HtoRRZU6yMc2bbQubqgXSG_ux9d7R_O1YGdRpsTEa2Y8aupWqKZ3MYwt0g%3D%3D)**

**[I’m gathering signatures for a petition I’m planning to submit in-person to the White House in support of 2A rights and I’m asking you to add your name today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=49b922e297aa465a8877f535e7eee378&_e=i9XFGA3Y11PyanAnSNUevw9ReXxwfmYNSce-QhrhIHu-65UNd3xRa3a9IM2nsNTu-ZX1A-P5-kwRa1WC0FluVnKezB0_5xSMEEKptzOSqqzHs3NL5y_SFkfPQyxpvGXg2EgKP3gEYj3-EjPnyAf1nLKbtCV20O5OXlsk1Q0ZhWyrMc6aXlX4MPZG61QP1ooXf6H9P9TGIplqW_oPzXe7nif5uYUnlMFKe3fXaB7RQIZHxN4maXTKcJ_UYujXVpxyknbwW6K5LSGimUTcCBjE1uBaHaiH0L8o7YIQ5o-pokevL29CEDhbrXvQwqn9FET_HPNf93EEgPEJlrqlxFMxNwv2GLR9VhvCvCOFYAz-gSDfwFW9zSACSwHHZqXav9fQ-GwQmzg2bydNSk1Dmo5w7TTUW14w8DzZ_bCQs5rFRsx0CA7d2Pv4M_f1eSJ48acmfj_h1vVoCkBs6wDUFCh7R7uMDAOkRhcG9qstvwA1yFjXe4mTnmRNmNV7JhclYTk3IYmMgvX1SqCAmwrsP_xu84SCKphUmuLYlA1aG3m3_3PxgfYOAtShFYoNlap2L7dMtCbXIFP5NZHFi6ZI4cCy_ygx09iyMysgB8470o8sH3ISJf-EHkdwLyLEU7vih2O5A2SszalHERzsDeD_j2A-9w%3D%3D)** Typically, the White House won’t acknowledge a petition with less than 100,000 signatures; that’s a lofty goal, but **if you and everyone reading this email today signed on** , we would quickly reach our goal.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=49b922e297aa465a8877f535e7eee378&_e=i9XFGA3Y11PyanAnSNUevw9ReXxwfmYNSce-QhrhIHu-65UNd3xRa3a9IM2nsNTu-ZX1A-P5-kwRa1WC0FluVnKezB0_5xSMEEKptzOSqqzHs3NL5y_SFkfPQyxpvGXg2EgKP3gEYj3-EjPnyAf1nLKbtCV20O5OXlsk1Q0ZhWyrMc6aXlX4MPZG61QP1ooXf6H9P9TGIplqW_oPzXe7nif5uYUnlMFKe3fXaB7RQIZHxN4maXTKcJ_UYujXVpxyknbwW6K5LSGimUTcCBjE1uBaHaiH0L8o7YIQ5o-pokevL29CEDhbrXvQwqn9FET_HPNf93EEgPEJlrqlxFMxNwv2GLR9VhvCvCOFYAz-gSDfwFW9zSACSwHHZqXav9fQ-GwQmzg2bydNSk1Dmo5w7TTUW14w8DzZ_bCQs5rFRsx0CA7d2Pv4M_f1eSJ48acmi1Jb59BlDE1WwAyIPRz6c3Cof55t9zZX7IlAy3qyghNUlUwPIpvPWAvwYkOjRZYow8Mn8P7peYl49ywBgT1YH3cId3mmD3Ba4r8J-5GkkMgxO-vP8il7eyHfHioIdVPvM1Xm93YIVPjdfSy6M0No-Z1y3A1oqs5TQDlf0d73JbLFCLbLbmD2t_CRMufLixYJ4_Z4v1mthKuVbCmRwMVRkg%3D%3D)
**The Supreme Court hasn’t banned assault rifles yet, but if President Biden stacks the Supreme Court as Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer are urging him to do, it will only be a matter of time.**

As I witnessed last summer from the front porch of my home, **people can have the best intentions in the world, but if you’re in a group of people and one person starts acting out, things can get out of control pretty quickly**.

Some may say that I’m not the real deal or that I’m trying to ride a viral moment to the Senate. That would be false. My wife Patricia and I have spent a considerable amount of time ensuring a bill in the Missouri legislature– which would prevent state law enforcement officials from enforcing federal laws that would prohibit the manufacture, ownership and use of firearms –passed into law.

I will never back down. I may be running for Senate in Missouri, but I’m running to be a senator for all freedom-loving Americans.

Democrats see strength in numbers, and if we reach 100,000 unique signatures the Swamp can’t ignore us.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=49b922e297aa465a8877f535e7eee378&_e=i9XFGA3Y11PyanAnSNUevw9ReXxwfmYNSce-QhrhIHu-65UNd3xRa3a9IM2nsNTu-ZX1A-P5-kwRa1WC0FluVnKezB0_5xSMEEKptzOSqqzHs3NL5y_SFkfPQyxpvGXg2EgKP3gEYj3-EjPnyAf1nLKbtCV20O5OXlsk1Q0ZhWyrMc6aXlX4MPZG61QP1ooXf6H9P9TGIplqW_oPzXe7nif5uYUnlMFKe3fXaB7RQIZHxN4maXTKcJ_UYujXVpxyknbwW6K5LSGimUTcCBjE1uBaHaiH0L8o7YIQ5o-pokevL29CEDhbrXvQwqn9FET_HPNf93EEgPEJlrqlxFMxNwv2GLR9VhvCvCOFYAz-gSDfwFW9zSACSwHHZqXav9fQ-GwQmzg2bydNSk1Dmo5w7TTUW14w8DzZ_bCQs5rFRsx0CA7d2Pv4M_f1eSJ48acmQb3YOd-GCs-XFVsHVxbEToZvYSkrmUgo0XHG6wDnpEwV8DqLeoFmh4VpF4s_OjD3AeSNiTJl9ZEAGOGLNH1zFYpqhToWgnEvJt-Kkeixa-pozZlhpfV5EruT0pyzTBrI8--YYdueJNet0yd3bRZhRoRDwpES308iQRhixmS8b7gK13mt2Ui2oE4UONR1m7gYDMWFzEVI5j3XFkA88f3VJA%3D%3D)**

Mark McCloskey
Republican Candidate for United States Senate

Since then, they addressed the Republican National Convention, and have been frequent guests on Fox, Newsmax, OAN, CNN and a variety of national and local news and talk TV and radio programs. clean_body: People can have the best intentions in the world, but if you’re in a group of people and one person starts acting out, things can get out of control p VOTE NOW &NDASH; We're looking for 50,000 conservatives to answer this question: Does Trump still lead the Republican Party? | ABOUT THIS EMAIL : PETITION TO PROTECT THE 2ND AMENDMENT WHY THIS MATTERS: Our 2A rights are under attack from the far Left and President Biden ABOUT ME: Mark McCloskey. Candidate for U.S. Senate. Defended my home from FASCIST BLM mob. . KEEP READING BELOW Fellow American, On June 28th and again on July 3rd, 2020 the Second Amendment to the United States Constitution saved the life of not only myself, but my wife’s life. When the angry Fascist Black Lives Matter mob came marching toward our home, we did what many of you reading this email right now would do: we grabbed our guns to protect our home and our lives. Turns out our Founding Fathers were onto something when they decided to prominently place Americans’ rights to keep and bear arms into the Constitution. Typically, the White House won’t acknowledge a petition with less than 100,000 signatures; that’s a lofty goal, but if you and everyone reading this email today signed on , we would quickly reach our goal. The Supreme Court hasn’t banned assault rifles yet, but if President Biden stacks the Supreme Court as Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer are urging him to do, it will only be a matter of time. As I witnessed last summer from the front porch of my home, people can have the best intentions in the world, but if you’re in a group of people and one person starts acting out, things can get out of control pretty quickly. Some may say that I’m not the real deal or that I’m trying to ride a viral moment to the Senate. That would be false. My wife Patricia and I have spent a considerable amount of time ensuring a bill in the Missouri legislature– which would prevent state law enforcement officials from enforcing federal laws that would prohibit the manufacture, ownership and use of firearms –passed into law. I will never back down. I may be running for Senate in Missouri, but I’m running to be a senator for all freedom-loving Americans. For America, Mark McCloskey Republican Candidate for United States Senate | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. Since then, they addressed the Republican National Convention, and have been frequent guests on Fox, Newsmax, OAN, CNN and a variety of national and local news and talk TV and radio programs. They campaigned extensively in support of President Trump and continue to speak around the nation on their support of the Constitution, the traditional values that have made the USA the greatest nation on earth, and the current threats to its continued existence. ---|--- | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335 Saint Louis, MO 63108 Don't want to receive our emails?

_\---------- Original message sent on June 8, 2021 ---------_
Peter, we did it.
Never in our 400 year history has Virginia elected a woman of color to statewide office — tonight, we’ve come that much closer.
**I am so proud to be your Democratic nominee for Lieutenant Governor. Before I go any further, I have to ask:[Can I count on you to become a founding donor and help us continue building on our momentum as we head into the general election? You can chip in to our historic campaign right here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30530273/289823669/-1679821363?refcode=hla-em-210609-results&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWQyZDQzOC01M2M5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xHQCwPOhheZkNR0BrFrkqlLiBKMsDyzi-Tocotbj0nI=)**
When you live a life of struggle — losing a father to gun violence, surviving childbirth only thanks to Medicaid, struggling to put food on my family’s table and a roof over our heads — it puts things in perspective.
That’s why I worked tirelessly in the House of Delegates with my colleagues to expand Medicaid for more than 500,000 Virginians, raise teacher pay, ratify the Equal Rights Amendment, and more.
**But we still have so much work to do. And make no mistake, Republicans like Winsome Sears will do anything to roll back the progress we’ve made.**
Sears and her running mates have repeatedly advocated to strip Virginians of their voting rights, defund our public school system, and gut affordable health care for more than half a million Virginians — including stripping protections for folks with pre-existing conditions.
We simply cannot afford to have an anti-democracy, pro-Trump Lieutenant Governor. Virginia families need a Lieutenant Governor who will build bridges instead of barriers to progress, someone who understands their struggles, and someone who can build on the progress we’ve made so far to make our Commonwealth a better place for all of us.
**I am that candidate, and as Lieutenant Governor, I will be a leader for all Virginians, no matter who you are, who you love, who you pray to, or what side of the aisle you stand on.**
Tonight, I became the Democratic nominee for Lt. Governor. Tomorrow, the attacks start coming. The GOP will throw every dirty trick in the book at us and we need to be prepared for anything.
**So, I’m asking you to become a founding donor as we reach a turning point in this election. Will you donate $10 now to help us build the campaign we need to win this race and make history in November?**
