**IN 2021:** DeJoy is following through on his horrendous plan to SLASH post offices, good-paying government jobs, and the USPS’s reputation.

**AND NOW,** the FBI is investigating him for BLATANT corruption he’s brought to the Post Office. We need 2,000 Democrats to help take him DOWN!

This is our chance to SAVE the Post Office from MAGA Republicans clutches. **[CHIP IN $3 TO HELP US OUST DEJOY AND PROTECT THE POST OFFICE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30530896/289826781/1059920882?amount=3&refcode=TCFC_20210609_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTE2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmUwMWZkZi01NGM5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WK-1qoRSnT5zQ8i_VkqMf3-G5gcO1pBqjFy_Mb__FRc=)**

name: PA Alert (LeftAction)
subject: Keystone Progress wants to talk to you
body:
Pennsylvania: Special Alert
| | | | | _Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://leftaction.salsalabs.org/keystoneoptout1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_
---
|
---
| | | Hi Friend, Our partners at Keystone Progress want to talk to you about their work to support Progressives in Pennsylvania. We think this work is critical, particularly as we approach so many upcoming Judicial elections in November in PA. We’d strongly encourage you to hear what they have to say. **[If you do not want to receive communications from them, simply click on this link, and you will not receive them.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc606c019-ff56-4524-8874-58a2e0941cfd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Otherwise, you will receive them, but always have the opportunity to unsubscribe immediately. Here's more about this effort: _**Every single day, Keystone Progress works to build powerful coalitions that protect our democracy and hold the powerful accountable for their actions. **_ _To do this, we collaborate with communities across the state of Pennsylvania around issues like reproductive rights, environmental justice, and criminal justice reform. We work to elect progressive candidates, help the people organize, and offer public education through our nonprofit arm, the Keystone Progress Education Fund. _ **This effort is key, and we'd strongly encourage you to give Keystone Progress a chance to explain why.** Thanks for your support, and for fighting back! Sincerely, The Left Action team
###

name: Giffords.org
subject: Re: California Assault Weapons Ban
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
An AR-15 is not a swiss Army knife...plain and simple.
An AR-15 was the weapon used in Parkland, Las Vegas, Sandy Hook, and so many more tragedies.
If these attacks had been perpetrated by someone wielding a swiss army knife, there'd be a lot of Americans still alive today.
However, this past Friday, an extremist federal judge prioritized these weapons of war over the lives of Californians when he overturned California’s 32-year long assault weapons ban.
The families who have lost loved ones to these weapons of war can attest to the reality that these weapons are not like ‘swiss army knives’ nor are mass shootings only a ‘very small’ problem.
We are outraged by this misguided decision that has been influenced by the NRA. We are mobilizing nationwide to fight back against this ruling, because if it can happen in California it can happen anywhere.
[**So will you add your name today if you agree that one judge with extremist views shouldn’t be able to undo over 30 years of progress on commonsense gun safety? If enough of us speak out we can work to undo the damage done by this dangerous decision.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/ca_ban_petition?source=em210609-1-15&t=1&akid=207%2E3935704%2EZnZbMs)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/ca_ban_petition?source=em210609-1-15&t=2&akid=207%2E3935704%2EZnZbMs)**
The gun lobby continues to advance extreme positions on the Second Amendment in courts across the country, including the Supreme Court.
In the California lawsuit and many others, we’re keeping up the fight against the NRA’s reckless campaigns to strike down the laws that keep our families and communities safe.
Your support is what allows us to keep moving one foot in front of the other so we can keep up the fight and save lives — so thank you.
**We hope you’ll consider adding your name and speaking out with us today. You can use the link below to join the fight:**
[**https://go.giffords.org/go/Join-The-Fight**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/ca_ban_petition?source=em210609-1-15&t=3&akid=207%2E3935704%2EZnZbMs)
Our very best,
Team Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=207%2E3935704%2EZnZbMs) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Jodi Picoult
subject: Join me & Senator Hassan to fight for women’s rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hi there, I am writing to personally invite you to a virtual event THIS FRIDAY with me and Senator Maggie Hassan. In 2018, I wrote a book called _A Spark of Light_ to inspire people to start difficult conversations and create more understanding about the choices we make. More so than ever, reproductive rights are under attack, from state legislatures to the Supreme Court. I hope you will join us on Friday for a book-club style dialogue centered around my book, _A Spark of Light_ , and the complexities surrounding access to reproductive health care. **Date:** Friday June 11th
**Time:** 1:00-2:00 PM ET
**Location:** ZOOM; link sent upon registration | | [RSVP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30531641/289829330/-1218724087?refcode=e20210609_jp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTk5YTg0YS01N2M5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h3DMqlkle4qasT8ut9IfIGNAjazgl7VtoErNdv7dLlU=)
---
With a precariously narrow Senate majority on the line, this election — and making sure Maggie wins — is really, truly, about all of us. I hope to see you there for this important conversation.
All the best,
Jodi Picoult

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

I hope you will join us on Friday for a book-club style dialogue centered around my book, A Spark of Light , and the complexities surrounding access to reproductive health care. Date: Friday June 11th Time: 1:00-2:00 PM ET Location: ZOOM; link sent upon registration | | = With a precariously narrow Senate majority on the line, this election — and making sure Maggie wins — is really, truly, about all of us. I hope to see you there for this important conversation. All the best, Jodi Picoult | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States To receive fewer emails, click Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Maggie for NH

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: A piece of Wisconsin history you might not know about
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Happy Pride Month, Peter!

Wisconsin has long been at the forefront of the fight for equality, and Wisconsinites have a habit of breaking down barriers and making history when it comes to LGBTQ+ representation.

The first openly LGBTQ+ Senator in our nation's history is our very own Tammy Baldwin. Mark Pocan is one of only a handful of openly gay Members of Congress, he currently serves Wisconsin's 2nd District. And even RuPaul's Drag Race season 12 winner, Jaida Essence Hall, is a Wisconsinite, born in Milwaukee.

But there's another part of our state's history that you might not know about. In 1971, Donna Burkett and her partner, Manonia Evans, were denied a marriage license by the Milwaukee County Clerk's office. They fought back through a lawsuit -- one of our nation's first fights for marriage equality -- and were ultimately granted the right to marry.

Now, fifty years later, marriage equality is the law of the land thanks to the work of activists like Donna Burkett. **But here's the hard truth: despite the progress we've made, the fight for equality isn't over yet.**

The Human Rights Campaign has called 2021 the worst year for anti-LGBTQ+ legislation in recent history. State legislators across the country have waged coordinated attacks against transgender youth, and LGBTQ+ Americans still face harassment, discrimination, and even violence on a frequent basis.

We must do better. In the Senate, I'll always be an ally for LGBTQ+ Wisconsinites and ensure they are granted equal protection under the law. It's long past time we provided adequate legal protections for the LGBTQ+ community, and that's one of the reasons why I support the Equality Act.

The Equality Act would prohibit discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation and gender identity and undo much of the damage that conservative state legislatures across the country have inflicted upon the LGBTQ+ community. The Senate has a duty to urgently pass this legislation.

**[This Pride Month, will you show your support for the LGBTQ+ community by becoming a citizen co-sponsor of the Equality Act? Add your name today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30531788/289829710/1104029110?gpsid=50_130_19312&ms=em21_210609_Pride_adv_gq_act__SG_ettx&refcode=em21_210609_Pride_adv_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210609_Pride_adv_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWE0YzZlZi01N2M5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VNco9E7trkSWiYOKoVEDE6pdh2jzKLyimzVuRLW1AEQ=&emci=daa4c6ef-57c9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=dea4c6ef-57c9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18659593)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30531789/289829711/1104029110?gpsid=50_130_19312&ms=em21_210609_Pride_adv_gq_act__SG_ettx&refcode=em21_210609_Pride_adv_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210609_Pride_adv_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWE0YzZlZi01N2M5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VNco9E7trkSWiYOKoVEDE6pdh2jzKLyimzVuRLW1AEQ=&emci=daa4c6ef-57c9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=dea4c6ef-57c9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18659593)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Will you help Terry take on Glenn Youngkin?
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30533150/289836179/-2023814932?refcode=20210609_TK_6TK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjUzMGMxYy01ZGM5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nRAEdl0tSJlNUw8wP_AD1R4ouKB3nzxdIQnQsDYsCaM=)

| | Derek,

Last night, my friend Terry McAuliffe officially won the Democratic nomination for Virginia Governor. [**I'm proud to support him and I'm asking you to join me by contributing to his campaign right now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30533151/289836187/-2023814932?refcode=20210609_TK_6TK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjUzMGMxYy01ZGM5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nRAEdl0tSJlNUw8wP_AD1R4ouKB3nzxdIQnQsDYsCaM=)

It’s hard to put into words just how important it is for Terry to win this November. Terry’s opponent Glenn Youngkin is a former private equity executive who said he’s willing to spend up to $75 million to buy a place in the Governor’s office.

Derek, Youngkin isn’t just endorsed by Donald Trump -- Glenn also says that Trump represents a lot of the reasons why he’s running.

His actions have made that clear. Youngkin spent the Republican primary pushing Donald Trump’s dangerous lie that the 2020 election was stolen. He even said a conspiracy theory about voting machines was the most important issue facing Virginians.

Here’s what I know: Glenn Youngkin might be running for Donald Trump, but Terry is running for _you_.

Terry’s running to make sure the Commonwealth comes back from COVID-19 stronger than ever. He’s running to expand health care and protect reproductive rights. He wants to get weapons of war off our streets while making historic investments in our schools.

Virginia has made incredible progress in recent years. The last thing we need is for Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump to take us back.

That’s why I’m asking you to support Terry. Election experts are calling Virginia one of the most important races in the country.

We must come together, reject Trumpism in our Commonwealth, and send a clear message in support of our positive and progressive future.

[**Please donate any amount that’s meaningful to you right now. Glenn Youngkin has an unlimited warchest to buy the Governor’s office and Terry needs our help.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30533152/289836193/-2023814932?refcode=20210609_TK_6TK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjUzMGMxYy01ZGM5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nRAEdl0tSJlNUw8wP_AD1R4ouKB3nzxdIQnQsDYsCaM=)

Thank you,

Tim Kaine | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30533153/289836200/-2023814932?refcode=20210609_TK_6TK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjUzMGMxYy01ZGM5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nRAEdl0tSJlNUw8wP_AD1R4ouKB3nzxdIQnQsDYsCaM=)

We must come together, reject Trumpism in our Commonwealth, and send a clear message in support of our positive and progressive future. = Thank you, Tim Kaine | = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 31408 Alexandria, VA 22310 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Andy Blalock for Congress
subject: Andy Blalock for Congress (June 2020)
body:
**Good morning,**
I hope this message finds you well.
We are just less than one year away from the 2022 primary and the campaign to elect Andy Blalock for Congress is doing great!
We have enjoyed meeting people throughout the district at ribbon cuttings, GOP events, special clubs, and community groups. The great people of this district have stated most often they want a representative for the people who will stand up to corrupt politicians, lobbyist, and corporations.
Friends, I am that guy!
The United States of America is a beautiful place to live that provides opportunity to those who are willing to work for it. However, politics that was designed to represent the people no longer does that. Rather, politics divide the American people and puts selfish greed ahead of the needs of the people simply to gain election to office.
A wise man recently told me “It is hard to get a good person elected, and even harder to keep a good principled person in office.” Folks, I will never back down to corrupt politicians, lobbyist, or corporations. I will earn my place in office to represent the people and always put AMERICA FIRST.
Thomas Jefferson once said “When Government fears the people, there is liberty. When the people fear the government, there is tyranny.”
Do you feel like the government works for you? Or do you feel like you work for and give to the government?
It is due time we put an end to electing politicians who divide America. We must let all people know regardless of race, gender, sexual orientation, or socioeconomic status that we support them and we will put AMERICA FIRST. America is a land of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. Anyone can succeed if they are willing to work for it.
When I am elected, I will support legislation that ensures the government works for the people.
**_Legislation I support_**
* Tax reform for a simplified tax code and reduced taxes
* Clean up of Government waste
* Support for small business and competition
* Support and protection for our Second Amendment Right
* Reform Section 230 and protect free speech
* Support for a strong military
* De-regulate education and healthcare
* Reform Common core
* Support for Parents Choice in schools

**_How can you help?_**
* Remain optimistic
* Share our website [www.andyblalock.org](http://www.andyblalock.org)
* Share our videos on YouTube andyblalock2020
* Follow and share us on Instagram and Facebook _Andy Blalock for Congress_
* Follow us on Twitter @BlalockFor
* Follow us on TikTok @andyblalockforcongress
* Welcome moderate and conservative minorities to the Republican Party
* Share with friends and family what you know about me
* 14-year school teacher
* 10-year small business owner at Grassland Ranch in Athens, AL
* Leader of many youth programs at Academy for Science & Foreign Language in Huntsville and at the ranch.
* Conservative on Fiscal Policy, Moderate on Social Issue
* A man who you can trust who will stand up to corrupt politicians and corporations

I am confident great things are ahead for the wonderful citizens of this country. I hope you will continue to support our campaign and should you ever need help or a word please do not hesitate to reach out to me.

Have a great day,

Andy Blalock

ANDY BLALOCK COMMITTEE
TO ELECT FOR CONGRESS
25055 Airport Road
Athens, AL 35614
931-722-0968

name: Alex Padilla
subject: I know the For the People Act will work because I’ve seen it in action
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

Friends —

Hundreds of voter suppression bills have been introduced since the 2020
election. This is all part of a full-scale assault on the core of our
democracy.

The For the People Act is the most comprehensive expansion of voting
rights since the Civil Rights Era. And it would establish an important
baseline of voting rights and ballot access for all voters in all states.

I know the For the People Act will improve voting rights in America
because as California’s Secretary of State, I helped adopt and implement
these best practices. And they worked, the 2020 election in California was
a success: it was accessible, secure, safe, and it drew a historic voter
turnout.

Stopping these attempts to silence the vote will take courage from my
Democrat and Republican colleagues in the Senate. And make no mistake, it
is up to us, and our silence on this issue will be deafening if we choose
not to act.

It’s going to take a massive people-powered effort fueled by small dollar
donations to get the Senate to act. Which is why I have to ask:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21/?refcode=em210609-1-15&t=1001&refcode2=71_159979_vH_rCq&akid=71%2E159979%2EvH_rCq ]If you’re able, will you make a $3 donation if you
support passing the For the People Act and restoring power back to the
people?

If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution
instantly:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210609-1-15&t=1014&refcode2=71_159979_vH_rCq&akid=71%2E159979%2EvH_rCq ]Donate $3 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210609-1-15&t=1015&refcode2=71_159979_vH_rCq&akid=71%2E159979%2EvH_rCq ]Donate $25

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210609-1-15&t=1016&refcode2=71_159979_vH_rCq&akid=71%2E159979%2EvH_rCq ]Donate $50 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210609-1-15&t=1017&refcode2=71_159979_vH_rCq&akid=71%2E159979%2EvH_rCq ]Donate $100

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210609-1-15&t=1018&refcode2=71_159979_vH_rCq&akid=71%2E159979%2EvH_rCq ]Donate $250 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210609-1-15&t=1019&refcode2=71_159979_vH_rCq&akid=71%2E159979%2EvH_rCq ]Other amount

With the right to vote under attack in states across the country, it is
both important and urgent that we act on these proven, common sense
election reforms.

Our democracy works best when everyone has a seat at the table, and I will
continue to fight for voting rights and election modernization until we
find a path forward.

Thank you in advance for chipping in,

—Alex

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?source=em210609-1-15&t=1020&refcode2=71_159979_vH_rCq&akid=71%2E159979%2EvH_rCq ]DONATE NOW

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.alex-padilla.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=71%2E159979%2EvH_rCq

For Congress to start actually working on behalf of the American people, it needs to pass legislation — **but Democrats have let the GOP railroad every attempt at progress and change.**

The time for negotiations is over in the Senate: you can’t negotiate with a party that wants to destroy voting rights and you can’t negotiate a jobs plan with a party that doesn’t want to create good-paying union jobs.

name: Evan (Finance Director)
subject: How has Ron DeSantis failed Florida? Let me count the ways
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
( + what Trump will do for Ron)
|
---

| | Friend,

How has Ron DeSantis failed Florida? Let me count the ways:
1. Signed a **voter suppression **bill into law, which made it harder for Floridians to vote by mail, limited drop boxes, and criminalized offering food and water to people waiting in line to vote
2. Opened the first pop-up COVID-19 vaccine sites in wealthy Florida neighborhoods **full of his political donors**
3. **Failed to lead** during the COVID-19 pandemic, had no vaccination plan, left all the hard decisions to local leaders, and then undermined their efforts to promote mask wearing that protected people's lives

**_I could go on and on, but you get the point._**

**[If we want to avoid letting this list of failures grow even longer, we _must_ beat Ron DeSantis in 2022. And Charlie Crist is the _only_ candidate to do it. Can you rush a donation to his campaign for governor?](https://act.myngp.com/el/3wkUoA4KjRAUsMzz7o6DaQ==/2hfTGULkgwlJSYFRMv5TWA==?refcode=20210607_f_1_fl&amount=10)** Remember: DeSantis has national Republicans _dumping_ money into his massive war chest, and we can't forget who lives in his backyard ...

**_... Donald Trump_** We've got to be clear-eyed about this: The defeated one-term president will do everything he can to raise gobs of money for DeSantis and ensure he cruises to victory.

**Charlie Crist has the best shot to throw a wrench into those gears and deny DeSantis a second term, but we 'll need all hands on deck to do it.**

**[As a strong grassroots Democrat, your help will be _critical_ to Charlie winning this race. Please pitch in immediately.](https://act.myngp.com/el/3wkUoA4KjRAUsMzz7o6DaQ==/2hfTGULkgwlJSYFRMv5TWA==?refcode=20210607_f_1_fl&amount=10)**

Thank you! \-- Evan Lawlor
Finance Director, Charlie Crist for Governor

# Donald Trump: Joe Manchin is “doing the right thing”
**Source:** **[YouTube](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30534738/289842758/-803653937?v=6C2MQ7fxUyk&t=51s&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkyODRmYzc3LTYxYzktZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=x1NiQWflt0JgE5txDoaHOpfKEWVe2ANuj00kfVi4L_o=&emci=7cce2649-54c9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=9284fc77-61c9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5546903)** Peter, Joe Manchin's opposition to ending the filibuster will inflict lasting damage on our democracy. **It's no wonder Trump stands with him.** | **[DONATE TO DEFEND DEMOCRACY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30534739/289842759/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210609_GEN_FDR_F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkyODRmYzc3LTYxYzktZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=x1NiQWflt0JgE5txDoaHOpfKEWVe2ANuj00kfVi4L_o=)**

If we are to have any hopes of fighting back against the GOP's far-right agenda and extreme voter discrimination efforts across the country, then we must abolish the filibuster. We're fighting back against Joe Manchin's opposition to progress and reality. **If we don't do that, then we will be surrendering in the fight against the GOP's march towards authoritarianism.**

This is a dire warning to the same Democrats who said Trump never stood a chance in 2016, the same Democrats who are doing nothing to fight voter suppression in states across the country, the same Democrats that, like Joe Manchin, still believe the GOP is willing to accept basic facts about the world around them. **And we're counting on Democrats like YOU to step up and show them what needs to be done.**

**[Peter, we're amping up the pressure in Manchin's home state of West Virginia. We're building a grassroots network to turn up the heat on Manchin's obstructionism, calling on him to take action against the GOP's Jim Crow 2.0 laws and prevent catastrophic losses in 2022 and 2024. But right now, we're $3,000 behind on our goal. Can you donate $10, $25, $50, or whatever you can today to show Joe Manchin that the time to act is now?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30534740/289842760/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210609_GEN_FDR_F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkyODRmYzc3LTYxYzktZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=x1NiQWflt0JgE5txDoaHOpfKEWVe2ANuj00kfVi4L_o=)**

name: Team Malcolm
subject: It’s so important for us to stand out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Hey team —
At the end of this month, we will face the second FEC filing deadline of our campaign.
A whole lot of candidates have entered the race since our last FEC deadline, and it's very important for us to stand out this time around with a big number to report.
[So if you're in a place to do so today, I hope you will consider making a donation to support our movement for working people.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30535850/289846713/-347207331?refcode2=7b1dc8a0-65c9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210609-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjFkYzhhMC02NWM5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9qiGzQwu7txCHs1oowkzjH3xk-7XyAHdo0bQ3OJhi9c=)
I know our deadline is a few weeks away, but I'm reaching out today because the numbers we post this quarter will have a huge impact on how people view the strength of our movement.
If we don’t post strong numbers, the pundits will say we don't have what it takes to win this race.
**But if everyone contributes whatever they can afford, we’ll show all of the naysayers that there's an enormous coalition of support behind Malcolm's historic campaign for Senate.**
[So that’s why I need to ask — can you make a contribution today, ahead of our big deadline at the end of this month, to ensure that our movement for working people comes out on top?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30535853/289846715/-347207331?refcode2=7b1dc8a0-65c9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210609-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjFkYzhhMC02NWM5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9qiGzQwu7txCHs1oowkzjH3xk-7XyAHdo0bQ3OJhi9c=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30535854/289846717/-347207331?refcode2=7b1dc8a0-65c9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210609-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjFkYzhhMC02NWM5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9qiGzQwu7txCHs1oowkzjH3xk-7XyAHdo0bQ3OJhi9c=)**
It means so much, especially during Pride Month, to have your support behind our campaign to make Malcolm the first openly gay man and the first LGBTQ person of color in the U.S. Senate.
Thanks for everything.
In solidarity,
Vanessa
Vanessa Clifford
Campaign Manager
Malcolm Kenyatta for U.S. Senate

* * *
Paid for by Malcolm PAC
---
Malcolm PAC
PO Box 22395
Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. St. Louis, MO - Eric Greitens for Senate announced today the campaign's new store where supporters can express their enthusiasm for the only American First candidate in the race and show the Missouri establishment RINO's and Democrats that President Donald J. Trump's policies are worth upholding.

name: Team Hayes
subject: We need to pass the Equality Act!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
Every person – no matter who they love, or how they identify – deserves equal protection under the law. Although this seems basic, it has been threatened repeatedly by Congress, the Court, and in our communities. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30537921/289853557/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGUxYjMwNC02ZWM5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7t0QUuExpclIY3a2le9ybSaykpSPLTzCkQWV3nJRHvQ=&emci=ec9166c6-65c9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=68e1b304-6ec9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15529135) | Happy Pride Month! Every person – no matter who they love, or how they identify – deserves equal protection under the law. Although this seems basic, it has been threatened repeatedly by Congress, the Court, and in our communities. **That’s why Jahana is an original co-sponsor of the Equality Act, which is historic legislation that extends full anti-discrimination protections to our LGBTQ+ family, friends and neighbors under the Civil Rights Act of 1964.** In many states, it is _**still legal**_ to discriminate on the basis of sexual orientation or gender identity. Too many LGBTQ+ Americans can be denied employment, education, credit, jury service, federal funding, housing, or public accommodations because of how they identify. **Jahana has been a champion for the LGBTQ+ community, working to put an end to decades of discrimination and ensure fair and equitable treatment in every facet of life.** She is a proud member of the Congressional Equality Caucus and has led a number of policy initiatives to ensure protections for the LGBTQ+ community including:
* Leading a letter to the Department of Education condemning the former administration’s intention to withhold federal funds based on Connecticut’s transgender-inclusive athletic policy
* Helping bring to light the alarming levels of bullying, harassment, and abuse of LGBTQ+ youth in Connecticut and in schools across the nation
* Introducing the _Eliminating the HHS Discrimination Division Act_ , which would abolish the Conscience and Religious Freedom Division at the Department of Health and Human Services
* Advocating for adequate housing resources to LGBTQ+ youth who are disproportionately likely to become homeless

_That is why Jahana’s voice is so important in Congress today._ With GOP State Legislatures around the country set to deny basic rights to the LGBTQ+ community, _**Jahana is instead leading with responsibility and decency.**_ She is our seat at the table at a time when our voices need to be heard. Every American should be treated with dignity and respect. This Pride Month, let’s keep fighting for LGBTQ+ equality and help remedy these ongoing injustices. – Team Hayes | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30537922/289853558/1522229062?refcode=E9041-20210609-PrideMonth-SB-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGUxYjMwNC02ZWM5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7t0QUuExpclIY3a2le9ybSaykpSPLTzCkQWV3nJRHvQ=)
---
* * *

Jahana has been a champion for the LGBTQ+ community, working to put an end to decades of discrimination and ensure fair and equitable treatment in every facet of life. She is a proud member of the Congressional Equality Caucus and has led a number of policy initiatives to ensure protections for the LGBTQ+ community including: Leading a letter to the Department of Education condemning the former administration’s intention to withhold federal funds based on Connecticut’s transgender-inclusive athletic policy Helping bring to light the alarming levels of bullying, harassment, and abuse of LGBTQ+ youth in Connecticut and in schools across the nation Introducing the Eliminating the HHS Discrimination Division Act , which would abolish the Conscience and Religious Freedom Division at the Department of Health and Human Services Advocating for adequate housing resources to LGBTQ+ youth who are disproportionately likely to become homeless That is why Jahana’s voice is so important in Congress today. With GOP State Legislatures around the country set to deny basic rights to the LGBTQ+ community, Jahana is instead leading with responsibility and decency. She is our seat at the table at a time when our voices need to be heard. Every American should be treated with dignity and respect. This Pride Month, let’s keep fighting for LGBTQ+ equality and help remedy these ongoing injustices. – Team Hayes | = * Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes Friends of Jahana Hayes P.O. Box 1487 Waterbury, CT 06721 United States

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Winning is our end game
body:
Judicial Watch continues to exert a powerful and positive impact against public corruption and unlawful government secrecy

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Judicial Watch continues to exert a powerful and positive impact _against_ public corruption and unlawful government secrecy.
Not a week goes by when our investigators and attorneys aren't unearthing shocking facts or explosive smoking-gun documents that corrupt politicians don't want us...or the American people...to see.
And hardly a day goes by when we are not holding corrupt politicians accountable and leading the fight for immigration law enforcement and honest elections!
And that is _no_ exaggeration.
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55891&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA2MDkxODIxMDk=)
---

You know that from seeing me and my colleagues on television and radio and from our regular email reports. And you know, too, that we are breaking important new ground on a number of critical fronts:

* Our **Biden Accountability Project** team has filed more than a dozen Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests and lawsuits against U.S. government agencies for records related to serious allegations _and evidence of Hunter/Joe Biden corruption and influence-peddling in Ukraine, China and elsewhere_.

* We are pursuing FOIA requests, with probable lawsuits coming, to determine whether **the open-borders****Biden administration is exceeding its constitutional and lawful authority** in issuing executive orders dismantling Trump administration immigration regulations... _orders so radical and far-reaching that they are triggering a massive surge of illegal aliens entering our nation and a humanitarian crisis on the border_.

* We are also digging into **Big Tech censorship** and recently forced the release of smoking-gun documents from **California** and **Iowa** showing state government officials conspiring with social media platforms to censor Americans' First Amendment rights. This is a looming scandal that has all the earmarks of a full-scale assault on conservative opinion and all Americans' freedom of speech!

But we haven't yet written the final chapters on our litigation on these and other important matters, which is why I ask you to **_[make you best donation to Judicial Watch right now.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55891&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA2MDkxODIxMDk=)_**

Personally, I'd like us to get _closer to the truth_ about the **Biden family corruption scandal** that the elite leftist media so scrupulously ignores...

...and _like you_ , I would like to fight in _more_ states for honest elections...keep challenging _more_ illegal sanctuary policies in courts across the country and open-borders overreach by the Biden administration...and hold _even more public officials_ in both political parties accountable for public corruption.

**We must continue to fight Deep State bureaucrats stonewalling our open records lawsuits as they did during the Trump administration (and the Obama administration before that)!**

But fighting isn't our endgame - _winning_ and _educating_ your fellow Americans is what we do best. And to do that we __must__ stay on track with _all_ of our investigations and lawsuits.

That's why I hope you will **_[make your best donation to Judicial Watch right now .](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55891&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA2MDkxODIxMDk=)_** Your generous support is __deeply__ appreciated!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55891&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA2MDkxODIxMDk=)

subject: 77 Days Later - Kamala still hasn't been to the border

body:
The border crisis continues to spiral out of control, and Kamala Harris still refuses to do her job

| | | |
---
| | Derek,

Kamala Harris continues to dodge questions and neglect her duties as overseer of the ongoing border crisis.

It has been _77 days_ since she was tasked with managing the surge of migrants at the southern border, and she has still yet to visit the catastrophe she should be managing.

[This behavior is inexcusable for someone tasked with upholding the law, and protecting the American people.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fwrong-border-kamala/1/01000179f20459e2-84499864-810c-4c13-9e48-546ec64cb61e-000000/0E8Oct8cXtZBmyvMNg8_K0lzpaQ=217)

clean_body: Gavin Newsom loves taking money out of your pocket, almost as much as he loves filling his own! While he taxes you at insane levels and shuts all Peter, Gavin Newsom loves taking money out of your pocket, almost as much as he loves filling his own! While he taxes you at insane levels and shuts all business, Newsom’s family is pocketing hundreds of thousands of dollars a year in behind-the-scenes quid pro quo business deals. Parents have spent the last 15 months struggling to balance work, at-home schooling, arbitrary COVID restrictions, and record financial loss. At the same time, Newsom and his pals enriched their families’ wealth, influence, and power. The corruption has to stop! The Sacramento Bee ’s recent investigation into the Newsom family scheme has many Californians fired up and ready to send him packing. Californians are tired. Just when we think there is no way Newsom can top his last blunder, he does. Career politicians like Gavin Newsom exploit every loophole imaginable to enrich their pocketbooks at the taxpayers’ expense. Thanks, Doug Ose \--------Forwarded Message Below-------- Peter, First, Gavin Newsom forced Californians to stay home. Then he gave workers incentives to stay at home rather than returning to the workforce. Now, businesses are suffering, and our economy is going down the drain. But here’s the kicker. While small business suffered in California, his family was making a fortune. While your shops were closed, Newsom’s wife was raking in large sums of money in corporate donations. How is she allowed to make money through quid-pro-quo deals, but you can’t have your business open? The first family of California has pocketed more than $2,000,000 from individuals and corporations since Gavin Newsom started serving as Governor. Newsom and his Sacramento-elite cronies sell California to the highest bidder, all while the state ranks lowest in every metric imaginable. While Californians are struggling to keep their businesses open... While the homelessness crisis rages, Gavin Newsom is lining his family’s pockets. And you’re footing the bill. It needs to stop right now. If you agree with me, I need you to help me do something about it: –Doug Ose | | PAID FOR BY OSE FOR GOVERNOR Click to unsubscribe.

subject: Exclusive: Rand Paul Fundraiser for Mike Gibbons
body:
Find out how you can join us

| | | | | |

| Friend,
I am excited to announce that Senator Rand Paul is coming to Cleveland for a fundraiser on behalf of my campaign next week.
Senator Paul will join us for a private reception on Saturday, June 19th from 5:00 - 7:00 P.M. in Fairview Park, just outside of Cleveland.
---
|
---
| The event is $1,000 per ticket, and there are additional opportunities to join our host committee and be a part of an exclusive roundtable discussion with Senator Paul.
If you'd like to RSVP, please click on the button below.
For more information, please email us at [info@gibbonsforohio.com](mailto:info@gibbonsforohio.com).
Best,
---
|

| Mike Gibbons Candidate for US Senate

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Housing IS a human right. Do you agree?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
People across America faced a housing crisis long before the pandemic pushed millions of additional families into poverty.
#
Peter,
**Pramila is leading the way on another critical issue: Housing.**
**She just introduced the Housing is a Human Right Act,** transformative legislation to authorize more than $300 billion for crucial housing infrastructure while reducing homelessness across America. **[If you agree that housing IS a human right, sign on to Pramila’s proposal as a citizen co-sponsor right now »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/housing_human_right/?source=em20210609&t=1&akid=358%2E420207%2EpJK1Gf)**
**[Add your name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/housing_human_right/?source=em20210609&t=2&akid=358%2E420207%2EpJK1Gf)**
People across America faced a housing crisis long before the pandemic pushed millions of additional families into poverty. One in four renters was spending half of their monthly income on rent, and nearly a million tenants are evicted each year. Homelessness keeps getting worse across the country. We desperately need the federal government to take bold action.
Supported by key affordable housing groups across America, that’s exactly what this bill does — takes immediate action to ensure everyone has a place to call home. Some of the important details include:
* Investing $100 billion in existing, critical housing grant programs

* Creating a new grant program to invest in humane infrastructure; providing municipalities with $6 billion a year through a flexible program that will allow them to address their most urgent infrastructure needs related to housing and homelessness

* Incentivizing local investments in humane, evidence-based models to support people experiencing homelessness, including alternatives to criminalization and penalization

* Providing $10 billion for FEMA emergency food and shelter grants

**[Pramila’s legislation meets the scale of the dire nationwide crisis. And together, we can pressure Congress to take immediate action. Help us put that pressure on by adding your name to the Housing is a Human Right Act today!](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/housing_human_right/?source=em20210609&t=3&akid=358%2E420207%2EpJK1Gf)**
**[Become a citizen co-sponsor »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/housing_human_right/?source=em20210609&t=4&akid=358%2E420207%2EpJK1Gf)**
We’re proud to say that this bold housing policy is endorsed by dozens of local, state, and national organizations, and it’s co-sponsored Members of Congress including Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Jamaal Bowman and Barbara Lee. We hope you’ll join all of these advocates today by signing on as well.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210609-358-footer&t=5&refcode2=358_420207_pJK1Gf&akid=358%2E420207%2EpJK1Gf)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=6&akid=358%2E420207%2EpJK1Gf)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=358%2E420207%2EpJK1Gf)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

| | Derek,

Terry loves people. When we travel across Virginia, he talks for hours with folks from all walks of life. It’s not surprising to hear that Terry thinks he can build the biggest grassroots team in Virginia history.

This time around, your support is even more important. If we don’t come together right now, we won’t win. All of the progress we’ve fought so hard for in Virginia will be gone, just like that.

We’re not about to let that happen and I’m counting on you to help.

[**Will you donate and join our historic grassroots movement for Virginia’s future?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30540967/289862719/-2023814932?refcode=20210609_DM_6AP_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTU5MzBjYi03OWM5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qh22XKh_9KVfRxHojg4agLRayZd-TdNoGa9zVjew2OA=)

With the future of reproductive rights, education, gun safety, LGBTQ+ rights, and so much more at risk, we can’t take this for granted.

Dorothy | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30540969/289862721/-2023814932?refcode=20210609_DM_6AP_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTU5MzBjYi03OWM5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qh22XKh_9KVfRxHojg4agLRayZd-TdNoGa9zVjew2OA=)

Folks,

**I wanted to touch base with my top supporters and let them know that I will be seeking re-election for the U.S. Senate in 2022.**
**_Watch Announcement Video Below_** [](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9951284/224717773/202572/3/)
Representing the people of Louisiana and the United States has been such an amazing privilege and one of the most important things I've done in my life, just below being a father and a husband to my wife and son.

**_[I'm asking for your support to keep the radical left out of your pockets and as far away from your jobs as possible.](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9951284/224717773/202572/4/)_**
| [ENDORSE ME HERE](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9951284/224717773/202572/5/)
---

I'm looking forward to getting back on the campaign trail and meeting with my constituents about the issues that matter most.**What you hear in town isn't what you see or hear up in Washington D.C., that's for certain!**

I'm trying to bring common sense and idiot control to the U.S. Senate, but Chuck Schumer isn't making that job easy. **But with your help, we might be able to get through to a few of these Democrats.**

**Chip in whatever you can. I can promise you it'll go towards helping me Take Back the Senate and defend conservatives across the country.**

name: Gary Chambers
subject: My endorsement:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
If elected, Erica will be the ONLY Black woman serving in the Senate — and the first ever to represent North Carolina.
#
Hi, it’s Gary Chambers.
I just spent a weekend touring North Carolina with Erica. I’m going to go back to help her again because she is someone I believe in. Her heart for people, her understanding of the issues, and her courage to speak the truth are what we need in the U.S. Senate.
**I’m PROUD to endorse Erica Smith running for U.S. Senate in North Carolina.**
Erica is a minister, teacher, mother, and a three-term state senator — and she’s a joyful warrior who would help pave the way to achieve Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, reparations, criminal justice reform, and so much more.
Right now, Erica’s campaign is building a massive coalition of diverse, working-class people to help stand up against the Democratic establishment and special interests groups working against her.
We can’t wait to build the momentum, we’ve got to do it now. Join me in support of Erica Smith. She needs our help:
[**Will you add your name to join Erica’s historic campaign for U.S. Senate? If elected, Erica will be the ONLY Black woman serving in the Senate — and the first ever to represent North Carolina.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/202106_endorseourcampaign_em/?source=em20210609-151&t=1&akid=151%2E3698%2EHP1vYU)
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/202106_endorseourcampaign_em/?source=em20210609-151&t=2&akid=151%2E3698%2EHP1vYU)**
Working people across America are struggling. We need leaders who will offer policies, not platitudes, and who have the political will to fight for an agenda bold enough and big enough to LIFT our communities up!
Erica is THAT leader. She knows the struggle, and she’s spent her whole life fighting for working people.
Now look, you know as well as I do:
[**Having a long list of official grassroots endorsers nationwide is important. It’ll show the strength of the moral movement Erica is building, so will you add your name next to mine to endorse Erica for the United States Senate?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/202106_endorseourcampaign_em/?source=em20210609-151&t=3&akid=151%2E3698%2EHP1vYU)
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/202106_endorseourcampaign_em/?t=4&akid=151%2E3698%2EHP1vYU)**
Thanks for all you do,
Gary
Gary Chambers

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210609-151-footer&t=5&refcode2=151_3698_HP1vYU&akid=151%2E3698%2EHP1vYU)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

name: Team AOC
subject: Big plans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We want to share what Alexandria and Courage to Change have been up to lately.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210609-2210-header&t=1&akid=2210%2E2526796%2E2MPf9G)
Alexandria experienced firsthand how difficult it is for working-class, grassroots candidates to break into politics and compete in a corrupt system where billionaires can buy elections. So she decided to launch Courage to Change in January 2020: **a leadership PAC that supports candidates who refuse to bow to establishment pressure, who advocate ferociously for working-class families, and who have lived the same struggles as the people they seek to represent.**
Our latest initiative is the **[Courage to Change Pledge](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9116?t=2&akid=2210%2E2526796%2E2MPf9G)** : a tool to help voters elect a strong, progressive slate of city council candidates in New York City. Candidates were invited to submit a questionnaire to pledge their commitment to support policies that prioritize working-class New Yorkers and to stand up to established interests.
The candidates answered questions like whether or not they support reducing the annual NYPD budget and shifting those funds towards community-based support systems, for example, and other commitments that align with ethical fundraising, prioritizing workers, investing in 21st century infrastructure, championing environmental justice, and more. ([**You can view the whole questionnaire here!**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/ctc-ny-endorsement/?t=3&akid=2210%2E2526796%2E2MPf9G))
Our team went through _every single response_ to see which candidates will “walk-the-walk” and help build a city that’s affordable, safe, and just for all. On Saturday at City Hall, we recognized _60 City Council candidates_ who received a perfect score on the questionnaire.
**We decided to start here in New York City before the primary on June 22, but with your help, AOC can continue to lead these efforts and we can continue to uplift and elect progressive candidates across the country.**
[Can you please help support these important initiatives by splitting a $3 contribution between Courage to Change and our campaign right now? Your donations will help us elect progressive community leaders, activists, and working-class candidates across the country.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210609?refcode=em20210609-2210-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&refcode2=2210_2526796_2MPf9G&akid=2210%2E2526796%2E2MPf9G)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210609?refcode=em20210609-2210-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2210_2526796_2MPf9G&akid=2210%2E2526796%2E2MPf9G)**
If you aren't able to make a donation today, we understand. There will be plenty of opportunities later on to support these candidates in other ways — and the most important thing is that you stay involved. Thank you for being part of this movement.
We’re so excited and hopeful about where we’re headed. More soon.
Team AOC
* PAC stands for Political Action Committee. PACs have been around since 1944 and exist for the purpose of raising and spending money to elect and defeat candidates. Too often, PACs are used by corporations and dark money groups to buy off politicians. Unlike super PACs that can take unlimited money from billionaires, Courage to Change is a leadership PAC that runs via small-dollar donations.

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210609?refcode=em20210609-2210-P&t=24&refcode2=2210_2526796_2MPf9G&akid=2210%2E2526796%2E2MPf9G)**

Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

The candidates answered questions like whether or not they support reducing the annual NYPD budget and shifting those funds towards community-based support systems, for example, and other commitments that align with ethical fundraising, prioritizing workers, investing in 21st century infrastructure, championing environmental justice, and more. () Our team went through every single response to see which candidates will “walk-the-walk” and help build a city that’s affordable, safe, and just for all. On Saturday at City Hall, we recognized 60 City Council candidates who received a perfect score on the questionnaire. We decided to start here in New York City before the primary on June 22, but with your help, AOC can continue to lead these efforts and we can continue to uplift and elect progressive candidates across the country. If you aren't able to make a donation today, we understand. There will be plenty of opportunities later on to support these candidates in other ways — and the most important thing is that you stay involved. Thank you for being part of this movement. We’re so excited and hopeful about where we’re headed. More soon. Team AOC PAC stands for Political Action Committee. PACs have been around since 1944 and exist for the purpose of raising and spending money to elect and defeat candidates. Too often, PACs are used by corporations and dark money groups to buy off politicians. Unlike super PACs that can take unlimited money from billionaires, Courage to Change is a leadership PAC that runs via small-dollar donations. | | Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: Senator Tim Scott
subject: Where is their mandate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC

Fellow American,

It’s Senator Tim Scott, and I need you to take action today to help me and my fellow Senate Republicans win back the Senate.

I wish Republicans still had the Senate majority and I weren’t having to write this email to you today **[asking for your assistance](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=30dde28de8924d83967243ac61df477b&_e=NPiK-tTIr51GS3Hy8o3efyR4W9_gqWxJGvidE9cvH_mUXA854LbLO6NqGhkM9s7QRHqaTh3vwuYgjqy97r-G4JE55ade3BW-OEcrsKBs1S82-ScaVcLNOT2Kn5PpRBc4TMXB1U2qf9hV5QRN0XiIrsa2_j6N4kPcZ4g3d4OyCy3Jh0HyUarX0O63-Z58N9K7HcKgF4B8jlLw7cDysQacAikCeRk8qIOeG3eRB3Tt33xJlYKAK2d4YHE_zh8_XMJFDkS9FL22m65SKot4SkRh2u9CeKYRbNssy5pCxYXr-USmNE5VENWfAEOkrX7VobleyN4lem5fnn5TttVOe1_cD-VT5JePZ3F6luJEBEd7vJkTCA4yXVFwPlPAFqK0nV9My_f0K7W9ugXweUyXG5j3MwIoUyMG6BaQsY18l48PT5dIOx-NG65sSW0d9WydBgCw3rAgIRyQmdhR7N6TMKMnBQ%3D%3D)** in helping us win it back, but here we are. Frankly, I am not sure a lot of folks realize what is at stake with Democrats in full control of Washington.

I’ll break it down for you:
1. **$6 TRILLION in additional federal spending**. Dems don’t care how to pay for it.
2. **Federalization of elections.** They don’t really care who gets to vote as long as new voters vote Democrat, all the while claiming Republicans are guilty of systemic racism.
3. **TWO new deep blue states** accompanied by two new DEM senators each. This would cement a Democrat majority for generations to come.
4. **Nuking of the Filibuster**. While this is a harder get for Dems, they’re putting maximum pressure on centrist democrats to cave and support stripping the minority party of any protection still available.

**[It’s paramount you’re on our team](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=30dde28de8924d83967243ac61df477b&_e=NPiK-tTIr51GS3Hy8o3efyR4W9_gqWxJGvidE9cvH_mUXA854LbLO6NqGhkM9s7QRHqaTh3vwuYgjqy97r-G4JE55ade3BW-OEcrsKBs1S82-ScaVcLNOT2Kn5PpRBc4TMXB1U2qf9hV5QRN0XiIrsa2_j6N4kPcZ4g3d4OyCy3Jh0HyUarX0O63-Z58N9K7HcKgF4B8jlLw7cDysQacAikCeRk8qIOeG3eRB3Tt33xJlYKAK2d4YHE_zh8_XMJF9obH7Wg92KIoIrJ7B6Ry7nsaa_6rEY9k0aUiVtR7YM1q4RePx1bgRoToFyM02pORUhiHTwvtEbwvyUnbKReaj7nx3OcbPLwNRE6beZmX_A4CbMa_9Fp3264GWVUVJhyvX2fXL9OUa-v4_SjltvbV2rbK1JcTstQi6dlgns4tGDgD_1BAE8GkoO6KM4y0xHI316pGx_2KVDTJbbIh3vuvTw%3D%3D)**.

Republicans only need a net gain of **_ONE_ seat to win back the Senate**, so with that in mind I’m asking for you to put a little skin in the game if you believe in the Republican vision for the country: **[Donate just $5 or more to our efforts.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=30dde28de8924d83967243ac61df477b&_e=NPiK-tTIr51GS3Hy8o3efyR4W9_gqWxJGvidE9cvH_mUXA854LbLO6NqGhkM9s7QRHqaTh3vwuYgjqy97r-G4JE55ade3BW-OEcrsKBs1S82-ScaVcLNOT2Kn5PpRBc4TMXB1U2qf9hV5QRN0XiIrsa2_j6N4kPcZ4g3d4OyCy3Jh0HyUarX0O63-Z58N9K7HcKgF4B8jlLw7cDysQacAikCeRk8qIOeG3eRB3Tt33xJlYKAK2d4YHE_zh8_XMJFYvSJF4gcF06VABStdA4faM4Pz6LgO0XN4P2R3_BaAYV4GFANgKwTJM_ME24ScCgUUTM4ZCmHbWjh4RPnfnXiJfbEwggHCuusgWwomwpeeNnr6yGmsVnXcD7WHfPXsII1P3W9fi8utMdnHB1e1bV9u8D8tWQS4QXs7L1E0q1LJqZG9vAmhZSgJXi2hwGZn-CZ7fEjdSTILr_BWAa5_fJZyA%3D%3D)**

Joe Biden may talk a good game and tweet nice things, but the fact of the matter is this - we’ve spent more money in the past two months than at any time since World War 2. **This rate of spending isn’t sustainable**.

And despite the thinnest Senate majority in years, Democrats think they have a mandate to implement the most radical makeover of society America has ever seen.

I’m committed to stopping them in their tracks, because I know Republicans can - and will - do better, **[but I need your help right now](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=30dde28de8924d83967243ac61df477b&_e=NPiK-tTIr51GS3Hy8o3efyR4W9_gqWxJGvidE9cvH_mUXA854LbLO6NqGhkM9s7QRHqaTh3vwuYgjqy97r-G4JE55ade3BW-OEcrsKBs1S82-ScaVcLNOT2Kn5PpRBc4TMXB1U2qf9hV5QRN0XiIrsa2_j6N4kPcZ4g3d4OyCy3Jh0HyUarX0O63-Z58N9K7HcKgF4B8jlLw7cDysQacAikCeRk8qIOeG3eRB3Tt33xJlYKAK2d4YHE_zh8_XMJFDuk4CpdjSgU8LOFCKU2xn7xwVmCa7TSUfB0903l9kIAOsvFAdXCwyKmO349t6puUZ_0QaibQtBZX6ptz8gWy5pOwaHP0qXZzYNEvf10lKnQ6-jch7nDk_r5NQRkE2sItxo1MscrrgaP68oDVzxWa5VTfLEbz4mqYfEwzbILKgAP2JOsqZk4AUS1Z-oLV32sRtkVo3qUX1sYVG2MoZoIfDA%3D%3D)**.

They don’t really care who gets to vote as long as new voters vote Democrat, all the while claiming Republicans are guilty of systemic racism. 3. TWO new deep blue states accompanied by two new DEM senators each. This would cement a Democrat majority for generations to come. 4. Nuking of the Filibuster. While this is a harder get for Dems, they’re putting maximum pressure on centrist democrats to cave and support stripping the minority party of any protection still available. . Republicans only need a net gain of ONE seat to win back the Senate, so with that in mind I’m asking for you to put a little skin in the game if you believe in the Republican vision for the country: | REQUEST FOR Status: PENDING Joe Biden may talk a good game and tweet nice things, but the fact of the matter is this - we’ve spent more money in the past two months than at any time since World War 2. This rate of spending isn’t sustainable. name: Team Patty
subject: See you at the (virtual) Golden Tennis Shoe Awards
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Each year, Senator Patty Murray hosts the Golden Tennis Shoe Awards to celebrate local heroes who have stepped up, given back, and made a difference in their communities.
#
Peter,
Each year, Senator Patty Murray hosts the Golden Tennis Shoe Awards to celebrate local heroes who have stepped up, given back, and made a difference in their communities.
Our 2020 winners included Rachel Duboff from Seattle who founded Neighbors Feeding Neighbors to help families put food on the table in the pandemic, Dr. Mabel Bodell who helped the Latino community in Washington state with COVID-19 resources and information, and Alise Morrissey, a family reunification advocate who helps parents overcome challenges like substance abuse and the navigating court systems. And the 2021 awardees are just as inspiring and determined to make a difference.
This year, Senator Murray will be joined by Virginia Senator Tim Kaine to honor our 2021 awardees and discuss our fight to defend our Democratic Senate majority in 2022.
**[Peter, don’t miss out on your chance to join us for this year’s Golden Tennis Shoe Awards. We’re hosting it virtually this year, so you can safely attend from wherever you are. RSVP to join Patty Murray, Tim Kaine, awardees and special guests on June 16.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30542520/289872021/249741741?refcode=pm_em_210609_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWQ2ZWE2OS04MWM5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UYOjNUIqTM_7c4cOJRI6OQOVKrnZkwyxq2Y97tvzdtw=&emci=265384a6-77c9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5ed6ea69-81c9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=13116610)**

Can you pledge to support our End of Quarter goals now?: Trust us, Peter, we aren’t reaching out to everyone this early. We wanted you to be the first to know. Each individual, political party committee, legislative caucus committee or approved political action committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600. Corporate contributions are not permissible. Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. name: House Conservatives
subject: This urgent news will impact you and your loved ones.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We know you're busy. We know you receive so many emails. But we've been losing to the Left for too long... We would not be reaching out if we thought we could win without YOU.

To unsubscribe, please visit [here](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9951299/224717773/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTk5NTEyOTk%3d&x=33bc582f).
Fellow Conservative: this urgent news _will_ impact you and your family. That's why we're asking you to fight back.

Radical Joe Biden wants to **RAISE TAXES** and take **FOUR TRILLION DOLLARS** from hard working Americans to pay for his Green New Deal and **INSANE SOCIALIST AGENDA**.

[**We can 't let that happen ****--****that 's why we need you on our side, Fellow Conservative.**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9951299/224717773/202578/2/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=4772f690)

House Leadership is counting on top patriots like you to chip in whatever you can to stand up to Biden and the Left's dangerous ideas. Even just $4 will go a long way to defending TOP CONSERVATIVES from the Left's attacks.

_If everyone who reads this email chips in, we can fight for an America First agenda that keeps the Radical Left out of your wallet._

[**CHIP IN $4**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9951299/224717773/202579/3/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=7ced3e59)

[**Can House Leadership count on your support today, Fellow Conservative?**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9951299/224717773/202580/4/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=3cbbe515)**We need every Patriot to DONATE BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT or we won 't have the resources to fight back against the Radical Left and their socialist agenda. **

We know you're busy. We know you receive so many emails. But we've been losing to the Left for too long... We would not be reaching out if we thought we could win without YOU.

[**CHIP IN $4**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9951299/224717773/202579/5/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=49a7b9fd)

It's time to fight back.

Thank you,

House Conservatives

Whether it's destroying our Energy Industry, allowing Illegal Immigrants to pour over our southern Border or undoing all of the great work President Trump did to make our country great, _**Biden and Murkowski are failing Alaskans every day!**_
I’ll be frank, this is one of the most watched elections in the country and if we’re going to win we’re going to need _YOUR_ help!

clean_body: | | | | Check it out Friend, Did you see what Sean Hannity said about our race in Alaska? I was excited to be a guest on Hannity with Lara Trump, where I discussed how crucial it is that we replace Liberal Lisa Murkowski in 2022 and bring our Conservative values to the Senate! Sean Hannity said it best –– in Alaska we’re known for our independent spirit and rugged individualism, but the Biden Administration has stripped us of that and Liberal Lisa Murkowski has proven she won’t do anything to stop it! Whether it's destroying our Energy Industry, allowing Illegal Immigrants to pour over our southern Border or undoing all of the great work President Trump did to make our country great, Biden and Murkowski are failing Alaskans every day! I’ll be frank, this is one of the most watched elections in the country and if we’re going to win we’re going to need YOUR help! Liberal Lisa Murkowski is bankrolled by the Swamp! The DC Insiders and special interests are flocking to her rescue because they know she will always stand up for them, not Alaska, and definitely not for our Conservative values. I am proud my campaign is funded by grassroots Conservative patriots like YOU! For Alaska, Kelly P.S. -- Team Kelly needs Conservatives like you to join the fight! kellyforak.com | | | | ==

body:
I’m reaching out to you today to formally introduce myself and fill you in on my big announcement. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5b325774e153406481e322e19d708298&_e=MMK76cbZaf68qMXlut9gheEgRZISoZXgib-fDYo7YP7hm_yS6isl3StwIbK7eZq2aOsLmZIZ83oCabyie-lmVfinxswGsYZu4eAiHFEbJM72BmpkEODi4gPHRBH2nvOipX57WI4Rj6lX828yhqCbaLqd32fwx4i6gnb0uE_v4cmy1I4Iubk9svQ5wI05MTScITMliyZZpQOTU_Uo8Ub2AnZGB73764gofiaqT7Is_sqfwCH4mn4htnIPvfnqkPm7Ep4nuFeCBM7S6TAriV5aN8K7oqetvyYUguTsBM_MbB2Ldpo51WvPpsL8Iq3fgTrGg1ir1V6aHgtxgyb8oOQmjBCYNkDCKiUZpHEs-49_dLi7T11MSoIW-YLnuf9pqI_I8Kx1HLmfkFzZStlDuM8-kQ%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

I’m reaching out to you today to formally introduce myself and fill you in on my big announcement. My name is Major General Michael "Mick" McGuire, USAF (Ret.) and I’m a husband, a father, and a proud Arizonan.

Today, I am formally announcing my campaign for the U.S. Senate seat in Arizona. I’ll be facing Mark Kelly - Chuck Schumer’s right-hand man - [**and I need your support today in order to win this race and help Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority!**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5b325774e153406481e322e19d708298&_e=MMK76cbZaf68qMXlut9gheEgRZISoZXgib-fDYo7YP7hm_yS6isl3StwIbK7eZq2aOsLmZIZ83oCabyie-lmVfinxswGsYZu4eAiHFEbJM72BmpkEODi4gPHRBH2nvOipX57WI4Rj6lX828yhqCbaLqd32fwx4i6gnb0uE_v4cmy1I4Iubk9svQ5wI05MTScAaY91V5ik415aQgaxSuNWHzllEBL3WqLAMJlmTi3KJUQwxw7GkPZn94jbd1RRVuV004VCot9Z83S2Ncbn6RX2E17nEGeIU3X_ghvYshxFz_P_dER64TNzx3XKQo005GdW7rDoALoc9O7KQdv6QXspaftkw0L2rK-8eAmbAPNxBCNT6d7nvFg1A-roiPOfE6aJteOM9ivc_9UZ2erAmEfhA%3D%3D)

[** ****JOIN MY TEAM ➤ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5b325774e153406481e322e19d708298&_e=MMK76cbZaf68qMXlut9gheEgRZISoZXgib-fDYo7YP7hm_yS6isl3StwIbK7eZq2aOsLmZIZ83oCabyie-lmVfinxswGsYZu4eAiHFEbJM72BmpkEODi4gPHRBH2nvOipX57WI4Rj6lX828yhqCbaLqd32fwx4i6gnb0uE_v4cmy1I4Iubk9svQ5wI05MTSciOzOZtcvVR5R_RsM4yVsPjyIpJ4f8WAt1yZixuoHZOkdzUQEqQxtNtGbc-Pw6Pdd9mImdx_CgnBeHv46cJwyPku5MewsSmngXe5nd3vc7PPGDmUSonfF1LQmHXq23Ryx7kGIWchxbYMjyL8Ij636XLAUrJsq2ZmrfQiV6ilPyBvnJtkGeubAWC6W-qF2TMSwokWXAoFIP4vzQHACLuqMGA%3D%3D)
Washington is broken. There are too many politicians who are only worried about making the right decision for THEMSELVES and NOT the American people they promised to protect.

As a former F-16 pilot and retired commanding general of the Arizona National Guard, I know what it takes to lead a team and make split second decisions that is the difference between saving and losing lives.

I’m ready on day one to fight for YOU and for what’s right for this country. That means:
1. Securing our border
2. Standing for life
3. Protecting our First and Second Amendment rights and
4. Walking shoulder to shoulder with law enforcement.

Each day the Left pushes our country further left, and we need a Senator in Arizona who will be a vote for our conservative way of life. I’m that vote, Fellow Conservative.

I can win this race, but I need to hear from you today. [**Will you make a contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate? It doesn’t need to be much - even just $5 or $10 will give my campaign the momentum it needs to build a winning foundation.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5b325774e153406481e322e19d708298&_e=MMK76cbZaf68qMXlut9gheEgRZISoZXgib-fDYo7YP7hm_yS6isl3StwIbK7eZq2aOsLmZIZ83oCabyie-lmVfinxswGsYZu4eAiHFEbJM72BmpkEODi4gPHRBH2nvOipX57WI4Rj6lX828yhqCbaLqd32fwx4i6gnb0uE_v4cmy1I4Iubk9svQ5wI05MTSc8MrbRu9JjUCQoASCuI1fwQaKZC4YDdn-Xi4xjeQL7YkuBF5niETtwSDdPGKvJTHZXmyhDpWodGfe8jygxwXPaFNc0wT59t4BRfAqOeHuiuTPlMbKw0eJ4NxPN3carE4ja9FbdTutvwIsfgcKx253enI74J5cg-UlOXpzJyz7Bvf6DhrJHHRgowaTClwzlNGJbbVmdobj4m3qmq3S9Vt1eQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: I’m reaching out to you today to formally introduce myself and fill you in on my big announcement. | Fellow Conservative, I’m reaching out to you today to formally introduce myself and fill you in on my big announcement. My name is Major General Michael "Mick" McGuire, USAF (Ret.) and I’m a husband, a father, and a proud Arizonan. Today, I am formally announcing my campaign for the U.S. Senate seat in Arizona. I’ll be facing Mark Kelly - Chuck Schumer’s right-hand man - Washington is broken. There are too many politicians who are only worried about making the right decision for THEMSELVES and NOT the American people they promised to protect. As a former F-16 pilot and retired commanding general of the Arizona National Guard, I know what it takes to lead a team and make split second decisions that is the difference between saving and losing lives. I’m ready on day one to fight for YOU and for what’s right for this country. That means: 1. Securing our border 2. Standing for life 3. Protecting our First and Second Amendment rights and 4. Walking shoulder to shoulder with law enforcement. Each day the Left pushes our country further left, and we need a Senator in Arizona who will be a vote for our conservative way of life. I’m that vote, Fellow Conservative. I can win this race, but I need to hear from you today. | | | | | | | Washington needs to STOP the games and fight for what’s right. If I’m lucky enough to be the next U.S. Senator from Arizona I will ALWAYS fight for YOU, protect our values, and stand up for what we believe in. For Liberty, Maj. Gen. Michael "Mick" McGuire, USAF (Ret.) | Maj. Gen. Michael "Mick" McGuire, USAF (Ret.) has dedicated nearly 38 years of his life to serving our country. body:

|
---

Peter,

Recently my team and I sent you an email asking for you to help us better understand the direction which the Republican Party is headed. More pointedly, **[we asked you to weigh in on whether or not you consider President Trump the leader of the Republican Party.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=df100899d527405195db2334ada1b9e8&_e=sWZljq1IXGrWi27ff-vak5bAi2bFp2mPifkh-6LA7ActqQShmevEqg8Ey1hSxCl8aIRCjmmhOKRR1LcDHm-nK7TQvG6qvqj5Q4gmSkmqCCtpGPPBTzg755oiK2vQtznbGmhuT9j--l9hX4KCkFcUt2wO9TqpgduD_dge0kCCjEc2zbK_XsedN7Pqi5PNmywDISG49enMeCb1dR0BV1eNDyDTizk_6fT6QurvWGdQu360-ISDN3OaELzBCGAtpPihPD3W8TDdvHhNl6e3Ty727blO2YTsX-lzTvEgc1T3_aDhbsuVkD7XpD0hv_dR_D_EBG0KzI1v2SukWgDlrEV4DXQcxTAZ0RV-hIkEuOui2AZGz5l7NB6PA6BWYh2R6igqm0guEi5vBIz7je9YPTvfczXW0yIJrrf9nQH5Qbems2ODowWwEsHfMkqQrimZtraLLBLDhshsFwGXyOdZDcxoi_67akLCPOv26EpkiuSRW_FA7m2PgJi-QCil878DyAICkcNJ5pGfQ6snLVWtEurCqw%3D%3D)**
