name: Patricia, me
subject: Six-year-old boy shot
body:
How do these people return to feeling safe and put their lives back together? | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=88727e1b9b0f4626b486dae1790f5d4a&_e=zGnNCWoM5eLUtNBx4Hzt08an3NOaESy_LrX2d3APr7Pc_A78RzwW9FUyq-gAZcEAc0itwDy7of0yY8vZErwVMfXkN7GchsbbJkkk4kJv1hUQs6fvcYAYRC8W0iyGa5DR3q5o6Qw3Mwc3mT3ZHam5uMjwe7avr2akmYKVg1QEmFcFXKYwQ2SiFe_5dfkj9qiddJy3VGMfHR6RptcXRY5_uep3bvMPq3pZ2_T2SWDWVlLsblx2tqH0DEWTTkF4viicjYbi_lQ1jjcI86FtHUog7aF02yygEEJkMVEtz_MvXLNyxjIjB-QM7M1fLAtZcmNCY116FJjCTfPHVyX1TzAEdYzrGAmACGNBsqT6FsJkjDk%3D)
---
Peter,

Violent crime is on the rise and countless new victims are created every single day, and it is happening in our own backyard.

* _In Orange County, California, a six-year-old boy was killed while his mother was driving him to school when an angry driver shot a gun through the back of their car on the freeway._

* _In Phoenix, a woman was sexually assaulted by two men after meeting one of them on a dating app. One of the men had a handgun in his pocket when police found and arrested him._

* _In Louisiana, a Texas man who was visiting to see his daughter graduate from high school was gunned down for no reason at all while opening the car door for his girlfriend. He is in critical condition and his shooter has not yet been identified._

* _Nationwide, murder rates were up 25% in 2020, with over 20,000 victims._

But while we justifiably focus on how to solve the problem and punish those responsible, **we often forget about the victims and their families.**

_How do the parents of the murdered six-year-old move on?_

_How does the sexual assault victim learn to trust again?_

_How do these people return to feeling safe and put their lives back together?_

At **Crime Survivors, Inc.** , we are focused on these people. They’re our neighbors, coworkers, friends, family - or maybe even you.

We are a **501c3, tax-exempt charitable organization** whose mission is to help these people transition from being victims to becoming survivors who can thrive and have hope and peace once again.

These victims need our help - [**and we need your help to help them. Your donation to Crime Survivors is 100% tax deductible**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=88727e1b9b0f4626b486dae1790f5d4a&_e=zGnNCWoM5eLUtNBx4Hzt08an3NOaESy_LrX2d3APr7Pc_A78RzwW9FUyq-gAZcEAc0itwDy7of0yY8vZErwVMfXkN7GchsbbJkkk4kJv1hUQs6fvcYAYRC8W0iyGa5DRcBZ6rxc4DtRvJpcL2nThee9BxENNLAL0oTKDWTLAC9u9pfOzRuIG4t58j6gwnRviPA6V85aK3-Kdu7ie4laj3yr__IPCyFWBlaf6HFZYfyZv20r_6yBfg2Wz_LtI7DpWO1L8cXBqM4IeCcuNDmKhsAM9zS5dtPeObOAXsbTGpwAax6599YBB-hBGOFNCSFngdZ4FSQIjFpGb8AJntWZhU2Lo9v589mRNKi98FFaSkmM%3D) and helps us provide survivors with c**ounseling, legal services, housing, food, employment, protection, and more** - and we do it all out of our brick-and-mortar Resource Center in Orange County, California, _which we also need to keep staffed and running._

[**SUPPORT CRIME SURVIVORS’ WORK**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=88727e1b9b0f4626b486dae1790f5d4a&_e=zGnNCWoM5eLUtNBx4Hzt08an3NOaESy_LrX2d3APr7Pc_A78RzwW9FUyq-gAZcEAc0itwDy7of0yY8vZErwVMfXkN7GchsbbJkkk4kJv1hUQs6fvcYAYRC8W0iyGa5DRbel14K9kTQnbmi-AFPkA65wx2aTOC1vK1-GIy7T78Y8RiMxNn4KtW3cex5cgWdmXN_9D8q3veFtihxk5_QS2554oOTMAwQLbHQA5PM64l-U95di5oWOPRpBHG64gaz6JC7VgAjzZSzh8lTkjQ20915iLOK8_lxvRCeunRg4yb3yAhjCZKJyf4KneSfQdC2JwV732RsyHbgDnQkwshdQkylppPnyPfWUgUclnBayAJAo%3D)
With soft-on-crime policies becoming more prevalent in our country, it is inevitable that this will only create more victims who need our critical and even _**life-saving**_ support and services.

I don’t use the term **“life-saving”** lightly, Peter - [**with support from generous donors like you over the past 18 years**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=88727e1b9b0f4626b486dae1790f5d4a&_e=zGnNCWoM5eLUtNBx4Hzt08an3NOaESy_LrX2d3APr7Pc_A78RzwW9FUyq-gAZcEAc0itwDy7of0yY8vZErwVMfXkN7GchsbbJkkk4kJv1hUQs6fvcYAYRC8W0iyGa5DR5TTUSarWdqyvjmEtWFUoFnWxBfKfwnxGnVXYG9OLLckuVauQ-NBse9-zFkJYwArDBRxQytkyeWW057rArUCp1cIwCMJrhxeleTtYiU5c8VgPIWbI1kh5OXWkOYlJmUIuaVnQzWbVDJe4A3i8NrlaNbPMLraMWmztPUFrETPZ6tQInRdMS4C9uzVK6MkhJQPgSTotqenPjXWFRcnzQftxx2MEJT2SYVNuoMWdekTXhgk%3D), we have helped thousands of survivors and saved hundreds of them from situations in which their lives were either in danger or they could have taken their own.

Here’s what one survivor has had to say about our work with them:

> _“After years of domestic violence and coerced control I finally left the situation only to find that it takes new formats. With my new freedom, my situation has drastically improved, and I am learning to be stronger, to have a voice, and to hold my own step by step. In those darkest and scariest first couple years Crime Survivors has given our family support and joy and hope. By caring about our plight when most didn’t understand or really know how to empathize Crime Survivors showed us love. I am grateful, and hopeful for our future!”_
[**SUPPORT CRIME SURVIVORS’ WORK**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=88727e1b9b0f4626b486dae1790f5d4a&_e=zGnNCWoM5eLUtNBx4Hzt08an3NOaESy_LrX2d3APr7Pc_A78RzwW9FUyq-gAZcEAc0itwDy7of0yY8vZErwVMfXkN7GchsbbJkkk4kJv1hUQs6fvcYAYRC8W0iyGa5DRNyx7ZM9C9FKQL-r4fJaOK5j0-ADVK_XnYDgvb0OcUvu8DCfl0CmG31p6S0PB0szRlsiPClbIlPnv5iAVPf9JRS8EpE_y5JFNGJY5KC_2i6eB01NqPzUcxsogky4LxIUSdlfg9uA3WcJx3ouEZAMkwSTA9YrKeteAMxJ1DxZg711UscnRCtEx_RAZCe4xxiU1nmIlSUf4OKroJyDJ3NnXopRsJ6jzxdsgtPoYh3UUQwU%3D)
This is just one of thousands, and sadly we know there are countless victims out there who we’ve yet to come in contact with and help. **But with your support, we can.**

[**Will you help Crime Survivors provide victims of violent crime abuse with the help, hope and healing they need by making a 100% tax-deductible donation of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250 or another amount today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=88727e1b9b0f4626b486dae1790f5d4a&_e=zGnNCWoM5eLUtNBx4Hzt08an3NOaESy_LrX2d3APr7Pc_A78RzwW9FUyq-gAZcEAc0itwDy7of0yY8vZErwVMfXkN7GchsbbJkkk4kJv1hUQs6fvcYAYRC8W0iyGa5DRX1ZaUIUQF_UUHWwMPObO1kc1N4HhE962gpLuTqFdL8-sLPRg0nFDxnoFHHqEvtdL79ADLLAAgh4HqzUaLMKX9QY1tarBzue4x-2v-f2EMjrcNSTb3ZQ-eq5H-0lyBg3cBFvVBTZv-_Qh68vILSflruOmQenHcDeyiXSQtBZ1swsoyUGvQYHoEp3cshw6elT_CQKMrugHYyihC4VmZ89fiJlPZVdJktr5GcyJ4yYqP8Q%3D)

Thank you for helping us change and even save lives!

With Faith, there is Hope.

Patricia Wenskunas, Founder/CEO
Crime Survivors, Inc.

[**SUPPORT CRIME SURVIVORS’ WORK**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=88727e1b9b0f4626b486dae1790f5d4a&_e=zGnNCWoM5eLUtNBx4Hzt08an3NOaESy_LrX2d3APr7Pc_A78RzwW9FUyq-gAZcEAc0itwDy7of0yY8vZErwVMfXkN7GchsbbJkkk4kJv1hUQs6fvcYAYRC8W0iyGa5DR0wx6CdOOwd9ST4wiKtYzq_CbcE4RGZm0B6e6AbRGsPatShMCvZjwQg9RbG1U9-2C51ngytXn_ljP6yB4xImJjy29NEtEwxwtVMj1PA-kaGFjB3reEKHhH-lGuzVyYMgtDEAs3k3IR93Z4OdaSyz9h7qE1yfTaO6FXZphpQsgV4TiU1cgTKLPed2t9f4hZPRV9wFdK-axPvFRW7-Xz3AHdEdbgEuH7eEtOHvrV47vuc4%3D)

| | _Based in Southern California, Crime Survivors, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) tax exempt non-profit organization working to enhance public awareness of victims' rights and needs and to provide resources, support and information to empower crime victims to survive and thrive.**[To support Crime Survivors, please make a donation of $5 or more today.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=88727e1b9b0f4626b486dae1790f5d4a&_e=zGnNCWoM5eLUtNBx4Hzt08an3NOaESy_LrX2d3APr7Pc_A78RzwW9FUyq-gAZcEAc0itwDy7of0yY8vZErwVMfXkN7GchsbbJkkk4kJv1hUQs6fvcYAYRC8W0iyGa5DRUTsIWGeNA2-3NPW6tuXmC4UqlQ5uE3SXkxV1BxsI5vPvHkTn5ob7n6f4spb0jGzbhAiliiAFZV_M69w_pt1V5ZroQuWrtD-ZImoBM_yzrqjQUKmzHMtFKq3vtooYPYAQ0WsCmrtlVXYFhm-e8hYaftKLeUQCuioAbrzUcZlhvc-TrudKlLyHyLsYDPThwlstM38nFkgsz37jL4zdewk2orRAFCUgL9mSUnH9qen4bBg%3D)**_

www.CrimeSurvivors.org

**Biden's government is living in Bizarro World.**

For too long, Washington has **recklessly spent your money while borrowing trillions of dollars from the futures of our children.** And if we don’t do something about it soon, our children will be the first generation to be worse off than their parents.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Help us beat the Leftist media!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
They are scared and lashing out |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=07766f033e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

You know an animal is in the corner when it starts lashing out.

**And that is exactly what we are seeing with the Democrats getting their claws out to fight back against America’s Audit in Maricopa County!**

**_70 percent of Maricopa Ballots have been recounted, and now the Democrats are getting scared!_**

My name is Mark Finchem. I am the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative, a pro-Trump Republican, a former police officer, paramedic, first responder, and Arizona business leader.

_I have been endorsed by Bernard Kerik, and I am the Conservative who will fight back against The Democrats long after America’s Audit is over!_

We are in for the long haul.

**One audit isn’t enough. We have to see through to Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Michigan, and even Georgia!**

**_And then we need to protect every election after that or the Democrats will never lose!_**

This is why I am running for Secretary of State in Arizona! I will protect the elections from the Steal and make sure that Arizona is the Red State it REALLY is!

[_Donate TODAY to protect America’s and Arizona’s elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9c2a4999d2&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f650b28678&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Let me take you on a tour of the Leftist mania in the media right now!

**“Experts call it a ‘clown show?” What experts? You mean the Democrats who don’t want to lose their precious Joe Biden win?**

**_When the words are vague, you know its fake!_**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=337cebc75b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **538 reports that the Audit is an “inquisition.”**

_Yes, the Spanish Inquisition was famous for their methodical, filmed counting of ballots. That’s what it was, fake news media, keep telling yourselves that._

**_I have never in my life seen people get so angry at something that should make them happy._**

If you are so confident that the election is legitimate, why do you get something at so angry at something, which would, in theory, prove you right?

_Yep folks, definitely nothing to see here!_
[_Join me in combatting media bias against election integrity by donating today!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=cad682f439&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=62da3f4342&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Ok, I have a question.

**If Audits were such a big risk then why did Biden just propose an 80 billion dollar tax hike to increase tax audits?**

Audits only cause “lasting damage” if you’re on the wrong side of the law.

**This is ridiculous and this only highlights the idiocy of the Democrats across the board.**

**_They really think Americans will fall for this crap._**

Well, good news here folks, we persist, we find more evidence of fraud by the day, and President Trump is on our side!
---
|
---
| This grass-roots movement is spreading folks and its get in or get out.

**President Trump is on the side of America’s Audit.**

Are you?

[_Donate TODAY to join the movement sweeping Conservative America and help me win Secretary of State of Arizona!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=85e0566d18&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f541cfd310&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d6d0cbb173&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

body:
It’s not my job to scare you, but as the chairman of the NRSC, it falls upon me to lead the charge in taking back the Senate from the socialist Democr President Biden's reckless orders continue to put Americans at harm from violent, convicted illegal aliens.

| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=06c88de24f46492b9f9e81d7a895bc2d&_e=Ud8Os4HW5Chxk9EzG2-ostb5Fs9gdQJOSDPshUXjEaLURklwBDn6Q8wWCewBxMiTVn1x4ZXeLzHTD6sxFNGBkGDoJpELv0FOHC1APUJvr50DJjjw9UX5VL-_n4rnIc2ydNfEC4y4diCj7QRu_AvVvhTuwulm2uvYC1qzMU-dqgxem4sEFkxhix82kb8VbxZsQXCmnZ8TwOrVrQYVNB14EpeVfbb8AnjFe1U-loRlESKtfnFokQvn8ppn3gjWlvz42Idvs_noFWz3vPix-xfm_G70H0YH4_5chKS07jx2cp9WdmBN3GbN14uHsguItkLhySy2GdYD9cPzIyfr-7dVWXdGF9h1zwkPwCxl_vL4qdOdrdosr4h673bwZDnD6R3fopcOLNT7XRNwU-qoLk_XN3wBs8c7HE-YVnnqhpyeKVhgh9cO1CdCPQRtlANkO3ESMpM1Vtqe-ht-_QMMBnfNZ3oO8t10rAmlvc_udcWKrDF27h4whVcIbZtpAbv0HpDGiyPnWcf2eXlXM54kjcOcrIndf2VLKuS7j-k7g3FjnBQFhZDlJ6hkCCuWui49MdMoMMpax5evKbeZKrxoE7632SWpA6JWwi_3yjFytDzQ0kr4Mz1oajpAMwCyeiFlrwE1wn0zxUeOl6ckomUYk-xjIayOUn4XlkUjrmXpUb-yzp-WLwfo106ALvmt8lPAUtOyZuoagUwZEkVy29_7Sqa75G2r9ySiQQwwY9QBZNXXkQI%3D)
---

Peter,

It’s Senator Rick Scott, chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee.

I didn’t mean to alarm you by the subject line of the email, but I had to get your attention. Why? Because if we don’t get our act together that fake subject line may be a real headline in national newspapers one day soon.

It’s not my job to scare you, but as the chairman of the NRSC, it falls upon me to lead the charge in taking back the Senate from the socialist Democrats next year;**to take back the Senate from the far-Left Democrats and return some sanity to our country**.

I’m writing to you today to follow up on a petition I circulated in April in which I set a goal of identifying 50,000 conservatives whose support we will need to flip the Senate next fall. We fell short. **In fact, we didn’t even come close to hitting our goal**.

**[That’s why before June 30th my Rick Scott for Florida team and I have set a goal of finding the 25,000 conservatives we fell short of identifying last month. This simple pledge of support to our efforts is critical as we work to fight for freedom and win back the Senate.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=06c88de24f46492b9f9e81d7a895bc2d&_e=Ud8Os4HW5Chxk9EzG2-ostb5Fs9gdQJOSDPshUXjEaLURklwBDn6Q8wWCewBxMiTVn1x4ZXeLzHTD6sxFNGBkGDoJpELv0FOHC1APUJvr50DJjjw9UX5VL-_n4rnIc2ydNfEC4y4diCj7QRu_AvVvhTuwulm2uvYC1qzMU-dqgxem4sEFkxhix82kb8VbxZsQXCmnZ8TwOrVrQYVNB14EpeVfbb8AnjFe1U-loRlESKtfnFokQvn8ppn3gjWlvz42Idvs_noFWz3vPix-xfm_G70H0YH4_5chKS07jx2cp9WdmBN3GbN14uHsguItkLhySy2GdYD9cPzIyfr-7dVWXdGF9h1zwkPwCxl_vL4qdOdrdosr4h673bwZDnD6R3fopcOLNT7XRNwU-qoLk_XN3wBs8c7HE-YVnnqhpyeKVhgh9cO1CdCPQRtlANkO3ESMpM1Vtqe-ht-_QMMBnfNZ3oO8t10rAmlvc_udcWKrDF27h4whVcIbZtpAbv0HpDGiyPnWcf2eXlXM54kjcOcrPAKOsD1eAzNzqsfmtLk4FcHomyKVEePDZZtGdpiAzx6OVxb-5IYuM63-YGKyTGgABM3ZQmRmqKsLkLwrwuRuAWTG2JZyC43K03Bh2ky0fZIUCHVPZof8R9DCNVpY_M6w8pCbqdvsuWOcpHoNQw2v_a35sGwjPTQlavw1witg2fbl5LcvSexrzYK1vFEpQwpFNU1wnCkmHQejtSEsrqrI2Y%3D)**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=06c88de24f46492b9f9e81d7a895bc2d&_e=Ud8Os4HW5Chxk9EzG2-ostb5Fs9gdQJOSDPshUXjEaLURklwBDn6Q8wWCewBxMiTVn1x4ZXeLzHTD6sxFNGBkGDoJpELv0FOHC1APUJvr50DJjjw9UX5VL-_n4rnIc2ydNfEC4y4diCj7QRu_AvVvhTuwulm2uvYC1qzMU-dqgxem4sEFkxhix82kb8VbxZsQXCmnZ8TwOrVrQYVNB14EpeVfbb8AnjFe1U-loRlESKtfnFokQvn8ppn3gjWlvz42Idvs_noFWz3vPix-xfm_G70H0YH4_5chKS07jx2cp9WdmBN3GbN14uHsguItkLhySy2GdYD9cPzIyfr-7dVWXdGF9h1zwkPwCxl_vL4qdOdrdosr4h673bwZDnD6R3fopcOLNT7XRNwU-qoLk_XN3wBs8c7HE-YVnnqhpyeKVhgh9cO1CdCPQRtlANkO3ESMpM1Vtqe-ht-_QMMBnfNZ3oO8t10rAmlvc_udcWKrDF27h4whVcIbZtpAbv0HpDGiyPnWcf2eXlXM54kjcOcrOv8xl8NSVd3G2zPxe_dQJP_aWSLzoc3WDm4wrE9CH0d-BtWZJxlMyJXxSS1NqBLRv0hhWtpf3yLNtJ5sJEOQxsjdnL7Z1JVGsA8fVuuaaqUn3Y5DynPSlMR9eiax339HwiHOdbg9cQfGGoOko6czBXbSHMXb6UVXZbOpUjiICvx-t5QTdJwf9rWaM_e6gjKqqEUMHHUsrMuP79Y9aAMDPE%3D)
It’s going to be a monumental task – Democrats are going to fight like hell to hold onto their 50-50 Senate majority; **Chuck Schumer is going to spend hundreds of millions of dollars to paint Republicans in the worst possible light**.

Democrats will lie about Republicans’ records of accomplishment and they will smear us every chance they get.

Think about what is at stake IF Republicans can’t flip the Senate next year:
1. Democrats will kill the filibuster, if they don’t do it sooner;
2. hey’ll spend trillions on pet projects that we will never be able to pay off;
3. And Democrats will federalize elections, creating a permanent Democrat majority.

**Republicans only need a net gain of ONE seat to win back the majority to take away the tie-breaking vote from Kamala Harris in the evenly divided Senate.**

**Victory is within reach – but we will come up short if we don’t have the support of every conservative from across the country. **

clean_body: It’s not my job to scare you, but as the chairman of the NRSC, it falls upon me to lead the charge in taking back the Senate from the socialist Democr President Biden's reckless orders continue to put Americans at harm from violent, convicted illegal aliens. | Peter, It’s Senator Rick Scott, chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee. I didn’t mean to alarm you by the subject line of the email, but I had to get your attention. Why? Because if we don’t get our act together that fake subject line may be a real headline in national newspapers one day soon. It’s not my job to scare you, but as the chairman of the NRSC, it falls upon me to lead the charge in taking back the Senate from the socialist Democrats next year;to take back the Senate from the far-Left Democrats and return some sanity to our country. I’m writing to you today to follow up on a petition I circulated in April in which I set a goal of identifying 50,000 conservatives whose support we will need to flip the Senate next fall. We fell short. In fact, we didn’t even come close to hitting our goal. It’s going to be a monumental task – Democrats are going to fight like hell to hold onto their 50-50 Senate majority; Chuck Schumer is going to spend hundreds of millions of dollars to paint Republicans in the worst possible light. Democrats will lie about Republicans’ records of accomplishment and they will smear us every chance they get. Think about what is at stake IF Republicans can’t flip the Senate next year: 1. Democrats will kill the filibuster, if they don’t do it sooner; 2. hey’ll spend trillions on pet projects that we will never be able to pay off; 3. And Democrats will federalize elections, creating a permanent Democrat majority. Republicans only need a net gain of ONE seat to win back the majority to take away the tie-breaking vote from Kamala Harris in the evenly divided Senate. Victory is within reach – but we will come up short if we don’t have the support of every conservative from across the country. I’m passionate about our shared conservative beliefs and. President Trump is counting on you. My team and I are counting on you. The future of our Republic is at stake. President Trump and I are counting on you. My team and I are counting on you. subject: Stop the Seven Romneys
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DRAIN THE DC SWAMP PAC
body:
Too many |
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=ac3846e9e2&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots delivering accountability to Congress, [with your help](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=74dc4010e9&e=ba6e67b849)!

**While we all know about the Liz Cheneys and Adam Kinzingers of the Swamp, we can't forget the selfish traitors on the other side of Capitol Hill.... the Senate.**

While we are thrilled the Senate acquitted President Trump, there were still seven traitor Republicans who did the wrong thing. _These people have the nerve to ask for our money and support at election time, but lack the spine to do the right thing when push comes to shove._

_Seven Republicans joined Democrats in voting to convict Trump, but support from 67 senators — or two-thirds of the chamber — would have been required for a conviction.

The Republicans in favor of conviction were: Bill Cassidy of Louisiana, Richard Burr of North Carolina, Susan Collins of Maine, Lisa Murkowski of Alaska, Mitt Romney of Utah, Ben Sasse of Nebraska and Pat Toomey of Pennsylvania._

No Democrats would ever do the same. They stand by their leaders, but our worthless RINO elected officials care about themselves only. Craven cowards.

Now, we already knew Romney and Murkowski were awful. Murkowski has never even earned 50% of the vote in her elections, and even lost the nomination in 2010. Romney is.... Romney. He had to move to Utah to find an election he could actually win.

_The rest of them have no excuse._

Sasse? Toomey? Burr? Cassidy? What the heck?

The problem of the RINOs in the Swamp may go a lot further than any of us knew.

_The Swamp that Trump went to drain extends to the U.S. Senate. We need to take out the Swampers so the rest fall in line._
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=931a885288&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **There is only one thing the RINOs understand: losing. We need to hold them accountable.**

We hear that the Swamp is going to go all out to save these traitors. Murkowski is up this year, most of the rest in 2024.

_The lot of them will be scared to death after we take some electoral scalps... and that's where we need your help._
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=2cb7e72369&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **We need Republicans who will fight Democrats, not join them. We need America First patriots, and we clearly don't have that now! [Help us show them the light!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=97bd0d6218&e=ba6e67b849)**

Swampers live to lie. We must punish their lies! [Your $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or $1,000 donation is c](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=8b7349cb6e&e=ba6e67b849)[rucial to holding the Senate accountable!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=12e1f68c48&e=ba6e67b849)

The Swamp never liked conservatives of principle. They distrust us, which is why they look down on us. Don't let them get away with it!

[Donate now.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=d2cac62658&e=ba6e67b849)

Respectfully,
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=2d6b95c4b4&e=ba6e67b849)

Businessman
America First Donor

P.S. Much to my personal shame there were TWO TEXANS who voted wrong: Rep. VAN TAYLOR of TX-03 & Rep. Tony Gonzales of TX-23. There is no excuse for these two RINO SWAMP creatures to be returned to Congress. Help me return Taylor & Gonzales to private life in ‘22!
P.P.S. We must defeat these RINOs! [Donate right now to help us defeat them.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=f36d20690e&e=ba6e67b849)

Friend, this isn’t the first time she has made inflammatory statements like this. She has a history of anti-semitic comments and often finds herself in common cause with Iran and Hamas.

Her consistent anti-semitism and anti-American agenda have no place in the Halls of Congress. It’s time for Democrats to decide either _**CENSURE**_ Ilhan Omar or _**OWN**_ her statements.
